1100701699.english: Even if it's established, there's no punishment, either legally or according to the rules.

1100701700.english: What is the Maiden of Justice?

1100701702.english: Rather than being treated like a demure maiden and having to live on eggshells, it's better to be called a wild maiden and live freely.
1100701702.korean: 정숙한 무녀 취급 받아서 눈치 살피며 살 바에는 망나니 무녀 소리 들으면서 자유롭게 사는 게 더 좋지.

1100701703.english: And if you have a problem with my personality, take it up with the developers.
1100701703.korean: 그리고 내 성격에 불만 있으면 개발자한테 따져.

1100701704.english: Since it's made this way, what can you do?

1100701706.english: And you've lost your beauty! The beauty! The priestess of justice and beauty!
1100701706.korean: 그리고 미모가 빠졌잖아! 미모가! 정의와 미모의 무녀!

1100701708.english: As the reconnaissance team reported, it's the enemy. Get ready.

1100701709.english: Okay! Then, according to the plan, as flashy and cool as possible!
1100701709.korean: 좋아! 그러면 작전대로 최대한 화려하고 멋지게!

1100701711.english: - The Orca's condition has been poor recently.
1100701711.korean: - 최근 오르카 호의 상태가 좋지 못했다.

1100701712.english: - Inside the Orca, strange noises and vibrations continued, and eventually, the propeller suddenly stopped while submerged, forcing an emergency ascent.
1100701712.korean: - 오르카 호 내부에서 이상한 소리와 진동이 계속 이어지더니 급기야 잠항 중에 갑자기 추진기가 멈춰서 긴급 부상을 해야했다.

1100701713.english: - As a result of Orca's engineers working tirelessly day and night to identify the cause.
1100701713.korean: - 오르카의 기술진들이 원인을 파악하기 위해서 불철주야 뛰어다닌 결과.

1100701714.english: Commander. I found the cause of the Orca's malfunction.
1100701714.korean: 사령관. 오르카 호의 고장 원인을 찾았거든?

1100701715.english: The problem was that the pump couldn't maintain pressure because there was an issue with the coolant circulation pump control circuit.
1100701715.korean: 냉각수 순환 펌프 제어 회로에 이상이 생기면서 펌프압을 유지하지 못한 게 문제였어요.

1100701716.english: When the pressure drops, cavitation occurs, which causes bubbles to form in the coolant. This damaged the pump, which in turn caused it to malfunction sequentially.
1100701716.korean: 압력이 낮아지면 냉각수에 기포가 생기는 공동현상이 일어나는데, 이게 펌프에 손상을 준 결과 순차적으로 이상 작동을 일으켰거든.

1100701717.english: So, the coolant supply to some equipment was disrupted, causing it to stop working.
1100701717.korean: 그래서 몇몇 장비에 냉각수 공급에 지장이 생겨 장비가 작동을 멈췄어요.

1100701718.english: I did a temporary fix, but it didn't solve the underlying problem.
1100701718.korean: 임시 수리는 했지만 근본적인 해결은 안 되거든.

1100701719.english: We need parts for the repair, but those parts aren't currently available at Orca.
1100701719.korean: 수리를 위해서 부속이 필요한데 지금 오르카에는 없는 부속들이거든요.

1100701720.english: I think we'll have to get the parts from the mainland, don't you think?
1100701720.korean: 아무래도 육지에서 부품들을 수급해야 할 거 같거든?

1100701721.english: - We unfolded the map and set a course for the nearest city.
1100701721.korean: - 우리는 지도를 펼쳐 가장 가까운 도시로 항로를 잡았다.

1100701722.english: - Just in case, we anchored the Orca a little outside the city and scouted the area.
1100701722.korean: - 만약을 대비해서 도시에서 조금 떨어진 곳에 오르카 호를 정박시키고 도시를 정찰했다.

1100701723.english: - To avoid cities where connectors exist or where Iron Blooded Beasts are active in large numbers.
1100701723.korean: - 연결체가 존재하거나 혹은 철충이 대규모로 활동을 하는 도시라면 피하기 위해서다.

1100701725.english: We've confirmed the presence of the Iron Worms, but their numbers aren't that high.
1100701725.korean: 철충의 존재를 확인했지만 그 수는 그렇게 많지 않아요.

1100701726.english: The city's destruction isn't as severe as I thought, so securing supplies seems easier.
1100701726.korean: 도시의 파괴도 생각보다 심각하지 않아서 물자 확보도 용이해 보여요.

1100701727.english: Oh, and as a special note, there's a branch of Densetsu located on the outskirts of the city.
1100701727.korean: 아, 그리고 특이사항으로 도시 외곽에 덴세츠의 지국이 존재해요.

1100701728.english: Yes. According to Hraesvelgr, it's a branch that specializes in live-action adaptations of games from the old era.
1100701728.korean: 네. 흐레스벨그의 말로는 옛 시대의 게임을 전문적으로 실사화하는 지국이라고 했어요.

1100701729.english: And, as a side note... it seems Hraesvelgr wants to explore that branch.
1100701729.korean: 그리고 여담이기는 한데… 흐레스벨그는 그 지국을 탐색하고 싶어하는 거 같아요.

1100701731.english: - Hraesvelgr is usually calm and collected, but when it comes to Densetsu, it gets easily excited, as if it's a different person.
1100701731.korean: - 평소에는 냉철하고 똑부러지게 행동하는 흐레스벨그지만 덴세츠랑 엮이면 사람이 달라진 것처럼 쉽게 흥분해버리니까.

1100701732.english: - The actor androids created by Densetsu, under the motto "more real than real," often displayed specs exceeding those of most androids.
1100701732.korean: - 덴세츠에서 만들어진 배우 바이오로이드들은 ‘실제보다 더 실제같이’라는 모토 하에 어지간한 바이오로이드들 이상의 스펙을 보여주곤 했다.

1100701733.english: - Both Johanna and Momo, Moonbit, Charlotte, Armand, Caen, Zero, and Faucre have shown combat power equal to or even greater than that of military androids.
1100701733.korean: - 요안나도 그렇고, 모모, 백토, 샬럿, 아르망, 카엔, 제로, 뽀끄루도 군용 바이오로이드 만큼, 아니, 그 이상의 전투력을 보여주곤 했다.

1100701734.english: - And if it were a place where games were being adapted into live-action, there would likely have been androids for filming battle scenes.
1100701734.korean: - 그리고 게임을 실사화하는 곳이었다면 높은 확률로 전투씬을 찍기 위한 바이오로이드들이 있었을 것이다.

1100701735.english: - Even if they aren't combat androids, the fact that androids are designed for specific purposes means they are likely to be helpful to us.
1100701735.korean: - 전투를 위한 바이오로이드가 아니더라도 특정한 목적을 위해서 바이오로이드가 설계되는 특성상 우리에게 도움이 될 확률이 높다.

1100701737.english: - Based on the Black Hound's reconnaissance report, we formulated a landing plan.
1100701737.korean: - 블랙 하운드의 정찰 보고서를 기반으로 우리는 상륙 계획을 세웠다.

1100701739.english: We will establish a base and dispatch an exploration squad.

1100701741.english: Should we send support troops to the Densetsu branch office as well?

1100701742.english: Hmph, if it were Leon, he'd probably ask if it isn't us who need his support instead.
1100701742.korean: 후후, 레오나라면 반대로 저희에게 지원이 필요하지 않겠냐고 되묻겠군요.

1100701743.english: Okay, I understand. I will report any unusual occurrences during the operation.
1100701743.korean: 알겠습니다. 작전 수행 중 특이 사항이 발생하면 보고드리겠습니다.

1100701744.english: - I ended communication with Mari and connected with Leona.
1100701744.korean: - 마리와의 통신을 종료하고 나는 레오나와 통신을 연결했다.

1100701747.english: There are also a lot of Ironclad remains around. The entrance is also tightly blocked.
1100701747.korean: 주위에 철충 잔해도 잔뜩 있고. 입구도 단단히 틀어막혀 있어.

1100701748.english: I don't think so. Judging by the fact that the debris is also old.
1100701748.korean: 그런 거 같지는 않아. 잔해들도 오래된 것들뿐인걸 보면.

1100701749.english: And there are a few Iron Worms wandering around nearby.
1100701749.korean: 그리고 철충 몇 마리가 근처에 돌아다니고 있어.

1100701750.english: Are you asking who needs support right now?

1100701751.english: Isn't it possible that our support is needed elsewhere instead?
1100701751.korean: 오히려 다른 데에서 우리 지원이 필요한 거 아냐?

1100701752.english: - Seeing Leona speaking as Marie said, I couldn't help but laugh.
1100701752.korean: - 마리의 말대로 말을 하는 레오나를 보고 나도 모르게 웃고 말았다.

1100701753.english: It's not just me, it's because it's Valhalla that there's no problem.
1100701753.korean: 나뿐만 아니라 발할라라서 문제가 없는 거야.

1100701754.english: - I laughed again at Leona's words, which were filled with a sense of belonging and pride.
1100701754.korean: - 레오나의 소속감과 자부심이 묻어나는 말에 나는 다시 웃었다.

1100701756.english: There's a Sky Knights squadron member hovering in the sky right now. Is there a reason for that?
1100701756.korean: 지금 하늘에 스카이 나이츠 부대원 하나가 기웃거리는데, 무슨 이유가 있어?

1100701757.english: - It's obvious who it is without them even saying.

1100701759.english: What? Okay. I'll finish up quickly and be back.

1100701760.english: - Hmm... this should satisfy Leonardo and Hraesvelgr.
1100701760.korean: - 음… 이러면 레오나도, 흐레스벨그도 만족시킬 수 있겠지.

1100701761.english: - ... Please, may Hraesvelgr not go too wild in the Earthly Realm...

1100701762.english: - The urban exploration and the investigation by the Densetsu Branch went smoothly.
1100701762.korean: - 도시 탐사, 덴세츠 지국의 조사는 순조로웠다.

1100701763.english: - The exploration team busily searched the city, securing necessary parts and other resources, while Valhalla and Hraesvelgr, who had gone to investigate the Densetsu branch, secured Densetsu's works and data.
1100701763.korean: - 탐사 부대는 분주히 도시를 뒤져 필요한 부품과 여타 자원들을 확보했고, 덴세츠 지국을 조사하러 간 발할라와 흐레스벨그는 덴세츠의 작품과 자료들을 확보했다.

1100701764.english: - Securing the genetic seeds was the main objective, but it wasn't bad that the entertainment options increased too.
1100701764.korean: - 유전자 씨앗 확보가 주목적이었지만 유흥거리가 늘어나는 것도 나쁘지는 않았으니까.

1100701765.english: - And fortunately, although there was only one, we were able to secure the genetic seed as well.
1100701765.korean: - 그리고 다행스럽게도 하나뿐이지만 유전자 씨앗도 확보할 수 있었다.

1100701766.english: The priestess of justice and beauty! Koyori appears!

1100701767.english: - A Bioroid with a strong personality has appeared.

1100701768.english: Hello, I'm Togashi Koyori, one of the main characters from Blade Across the Nation.
1100701768.korean: 안녕, 전국 블레이드의 주인공 중 한 명인 토가시 코요리야.

1100701769.english: Hello, my name is Togashi Koyori. I am Constantia, the head maid of Orca.
1100701769.korean: 안녕하세요, 토가시 코요리. 저는 오르카의 메이드장인 콘스탄챠입니다.

1100701770.english: Hello, Constantia. Just call me Koyori.

1100701772.english: What should I call you, human?

1100701775.english: Okay, Koyori. Then I'd like to ask you a few questions before you register as an Orca member.
1100701775.korean: 좋아요, 코요리. 그러면 오르카 대원으로 등록하기 전에 몇 가지 질문을 하려고 해요.

1100701776.english: It's not too complicated a question, so please feel free to answer.
1100701776.korean: 너무 복잡한 질문은 아니니까 편하게 대답해주세요.

1100701777.english: First, what's the last thing you remember?

1100701779.english: Did you upload your memories even after humanity was destroyed?
1100701779.korean: 인류 멸망 이후에도 기억을 업로드 했나요?

1100701780.english: Yeah, the branch I was at had a memory refresh device.
1100701780.korean: 응, 내가 있던 지국에 기억 갱신 장치가 있었거든.

1100701781.english: Not just me, but the other kids were also bio-androids produced only at the branch office where I was.
1100701781.korean: 나뿐만 아니라 다른 애들도 내가 있던 지국에서만 생산되던 바이오로이드였거든.

1100701782.english: Since the memory won't be uploaded anywhere else, I set up the device at the branch office.
1100701782.korean: 다른 곳에서 기억이 업로드 될 일이 없으니 지국에 장치를 마련했지.

1100701783.english: Do you know you're an actor?

1100701784.english: Yeah. I told you when we first met. You're one of the main characters in the national Blade competition.
1100701784.korean: 응. 첫 인사 때 말했잖아. 전국 블레이드의 주인공 중 한 명이라고.

1100701785.english: Well, considering there were actors in Densetsu who never realized they were actors until the very end, it's a natural question...
1100701785.korean: 하긴 덴세츠의 배우 중에는 자기가 배우라는 것을 끝까지 모르던 애들도 있었으니 당연한 질문인가…

1100701786.english: Haha... well... that's how it was...

1100701787.english: - Perhaps the faces of some of the Densetsu members flashed through Constantia's mind. Just like me.
1100701787.korean: - 아마 콘스탄챠의 머릿속에선 몇몇 덴세츠 대원들의 얼굴이 스쳐 지나갔을 것이다. 나와 마찬가지로 말이다.

1100701789.english: Of course. How many times have I saved the world?
1100701789.korean: 당연하지. 내가 세계를 구한 게 몇 번인데.

1100701790.english: Even tho it's a virtual world, they stayed true to their motto of "more real than real."
1100701790.korean: 비록 가상의 세계지만 실제보다 더 실제같이라는 모토는 충실하게 지켰다구.

1100701791.english: Well... in the end, I couldn't protect the real world, tho.
1100701791.korean: 뭐… 정작 실제 세계는 지키지 못했지만 말이야.

1100701792.english: Oh, can I ask a question?

1100701794.english: How many humans are left now?

1100701795.english: I thought it was destroyed shortly after the Iron Blooded invaded.
1100701795.korean: 철충이 침략하고 얼마 지나지 않아서 멸망한 것으로 알고 있었는데.

1100701797.english: You are the last human, Commander.

1100701800.english: After humanity was destroyed, Sister Labiata formed the resistance.
1100701800.korean: 인류가 멸망한 후에 라비아타 언니께서 저항군을 결성하셨거든요.

1100701801.english: ...And finally, we found the last and first human, our master... the commander.
1100701801.korean: ……그리고 마침내 마지막이자 최초의 인간님이신 주인님… 사령관님을 발견한 거죠.

1100701802.english: A lot of time has passed and a lot has happened since I last uploaded my memories...
1100701802.korean: 내가 마지막으로 기억을 업로드한 후로 많은 세월이 흐르고, 많은 일이 있었네…

1100701803.english: Commander, being the last human, you must feel a great sense of responsibility.

1100701806.english: If you're the commander, the others will like you too.

1100701807.english: Yeah. The other kids I worked with on the project. Did you join first by any chance?
1100701807.korean: 응. 나랑 같이 작품을 찍었던 다른 애들. 혹시 먼저 합류했어?

1100701808.english: Based on the atmosphere, it seems Koyori, who uploaded the last memory, hasn't joined, right?
1100701808.korean: 일단 분위기를 보니까 마지막으로 기억을 업로드한 코요리는 합류 안 했지?

1100701813.english: What about Hagane? What about Marion?

1100701815.english: Oh... well, I have been through a lot.

1100701822.english: The kunoichi, Kaen, of the withered flower of Muromachi...

1100701823.english: Um... I'm Togashi Koyori, the national blade.

1100701825.english: Um... I did call Kaen, but...

1100701826.english: The Kaen I was talking about isn't this Kaen...
1100701826.korean: 내가 말한 카엔은 이 카엔이 아닌데…

1100701827.english: It seems we have the same name.

1100701829.english: And it seems you haven't seen the work I appeared in.
1100701829.korean: 그리고 내가 등장한 작품은 안 봤나보네.

1100701830.english: If I had known, this wouldn't have happened.

1100701831.english: It's okay. It's okay. Are there only one or two works in the world?
1100701831.korean: 괜찮아. 괜찮아. 세상에 작품이 한두 개야?

1100701832.english: You might not be able to see it.

1100701834.english: Am I the only one left...?

1100701835.english: - Koyori, who had been lively chatting just a moment ago, noticeably deflated.
1100701835.korean: - 방금 전까지 활기차게 떠들던 코요리는 눈에 띄게 의기소침해졌다.

1100701836.english: - When I tried to comfort Koyori, she nodded her head vigorously.
1100701836.korean: - 내가 코요리를 위로하려고 할 때, 코요리는 크게 고개를 끄덕였다.

1100701837.english: Well, there's nothing we can do about it.

1100701838.english: Because it was such a desperate fight.

1100701839.english: Because it was a battle where even the most powerful shrine maiden in history, the righteous and beautiful shrine maiden Koyori, was destined to meet a bad ending.
1100701839.korean: 이 역대 최강의 영능력을 가진 무녀인 정의와 미모의 무녀 코요리도 배드 엔딩을 맞이할 수밖에 없는 싸움이었으니까.

1100701840.english: - Koyori instantly regained her energy and said playfully.
1100701840.korean: - 코요리는 순식간에 기운을 되찾고는 장난스럽게 말했다.

1100701841.english: Still, it stings my pride a little that you haven't seen the work I'm in.
1100701841.korean: 그래도 내가 등장하는 작품을 안 본 건 조금 자존심이 상하네.

1100701842.english: There's a game too, so play the game and watch the work.
1100701842.korean: 게임도 있으니까 게임도 하고 작품도 봐.

1100701843.english: - I wasn't just saying empty words, I answered sincerely.
1100701843.korean: - 나는 빈 말이 아니라 진심으로 대답했다.

1100701844.english: - It was partly to comfort her, and partly because I had become interested in her.
1100701844.korean: - 그녀를 위로하기 위한 마음도 있었고, 그녀에 대한 흥미도 생겼기 때문이다.

1100701845.english: - We exchanged a few more words and confirmed that Koyori had no disqualifying factors.
1100701845.korean: - 우리는 몇 마디 더 나누고 코요리에게 결격 사항이 없는 것을 확인했다.

1100701849.english: The priestess of justice and beauty! Because Koyori came back! This time, I'll be able to have a happy ending!
1100701849.korean: 정의와 미모의 무녀! 코요리가 다시 왔으니까! 이번에는 해피 엔딩을 맞이할 수 있을 거야!

1100701850.english: The branch manager was sacrificed to the monsters... the Iron Worms, just yesterday.
1100701850.korean: 지국장님께서 바로 어제 괴물… 철충들에게 희생당하셨다.

1100701851.english: So, I became the head of the branch office.
1100701851.korean: 그래서 지국의 최고 책임자는 내가 됐다.

1100701852.english: First, I would like to announce that the war with PECS and Black River has ended.
1100701852.korean: 우선 PECS, 블랙리버와의 전쟁이 끝났다는 것을 알린다.

1100701853.english: However, that doesn't mean an era of peace has arrived.
1100701853.korean: 하지만 평화의 시대는 도래했다는 말은 아니다.

1100701854.english: It's a truce for humanity to wage an all-out war against a greater enemy, monsters called Iron Blooded.
1100701854.korean: 더 큰 적, 철충이라고 불리는 괴물과 인류가 총력전을 벌이기 위한 종전이다.

1100701855.english: The AGS, which were humanity's greatest strength, have become hosts to the Iron Worms and are now turning their weapons against us.
1100701855.korean: 인류의 가장 큰 전력이었던 AGS들은 철충들의 숙주가 되어 반대로 우리에게 무기를 겨누는 상황이다.

1100701856.english: In this situation, our greatest strength is you, the Bioroids.
1100701856.korean: 이런 상황에서 우리의 가장 큰 전력은 너희들, 바이오로이드들이다.

1100701857.english: Protect us humans, even if it costs you your lives.
1100701857.korean: 너희들의 목숨을 바쳐서라도 우리 인간들을 지켜라.

1100701858.english: Don't let the Iron Blooded invade the branch office again like last time.
1100701858.korean: 저번처럼 지국에 철충의 침입을 허용하지 말란 말이다.

1100701859.english: You were created to serve humanity.
1100701859.korean: 너희들이 만들어진 이유는 인류에게 봉사하기 위해서다.

1100701861.english: We were created for the purpose of filming the work...
1100701861.korean: 우리가 만들어진 이유는 작품을 찍기 위해선데…

1100701862.english: Fundamentally speaking, it was made as a tool.

1100701863.english: You can't decide how a tool will be used, can you?
1100701863.korean: 도구는 어떻게 사용될 지 결정할 수 없지 않나.

1100701864.english: Still, since she's a Bioroid of Legend, shouldn't she be able to resist at least a little?
1100701864.korean: 그래도 덴세츠의 바이오로이드라서 저항이라도 할 수 있지 않나.

1100701865.english: Most civilian Bioroids can't even put up a decent fight, so isn't that a relatively better situation?
1100701865.korean: 대부분의 민간 바이오로이드는 제대로 된 저항도 못하니 그나마 나은 처지 아닌가.

1100701866.english: Being called capable means you'll be called upon and have to work hard in many different places...
1100701866.korean: 유능하다는 말은 그만큼 여기저기 불려 다녀서 구를 일도 많다는 건데...

1100701867.english: Oh well, what can you do?

1100701868.english: Being capable and beautiful is a crime, isn't it?

1100701869.english: Isn't it okay if it's not pretty?

1100701871.english: If you're attractive, you should also have good posture, right?
1100701871.korean: 매력적인 만큼 몸가짐도 바로 해야 하잖아.

1100701872.english: We're still actors, after all, actors.

1100701873.english: Densetsu is still making records of our activities, isn't it?
1100701873.korean: 아직도 덴세츠는 우리가 활약하는 기록물을 만들고 있잖아.

1100701874.english: Well... thanks to that, the treatment is good too.

1100701875.english: If you're going to treat me well, give me money. With money.
1100701875.korean: 대우해 줄 거면, 돈으로 줘. 돈으로.

1100701876.english: In this situation, what good is money anyway...
1100701876.korean: 이런 판국에 돈이 무슨 소용이 있다고…

1100701877.english: Why isn't it useful? It makes me feel good.

1100701879.english: Oh! What am I supposed to do with what I made like this?

1100701881.english: It seems the enemies aren't planning to let things go easily.

1100701884.english: No matter how many you beat, there's no end to them! The end!

1100701885.english: Aaaaaaaah! If you're coming, come all at once!

1100701886.english: This Koyori will take care of everything!

1100701888.english: It was a bit much to say that, tho.

1100701889.english: Where do these things keep coming from?
1100701889.korean: 이것들은 도대체 어디서 계속 솟아나는 거야?

1100701891.english: Well, for now at least. What about you?

1100701892.english: I don't have any serious injuries either, but...

1100701893.english: The east gate has been breached.

1100701894.english: I barely managed to stop it, but...

1100701895.english: There are not a few victims.

1100701897.english: Why are these things so relentlessly targeting humans?
1100701897.korean: ……이것들은 왜 이렇게 집요하게 인간들을 노리는 거지?

1100701898.english: Did you have a falling out or something?

1100701899.english: Are you trying to understand the monster?

1100701900.english: When I was filming the work, I just had to beat up the enemy in front of me.
1100701900.korean: 작품을 찍을 때는 그냥 눈앞의 적만 때려잡으면 됐는데.

1100701901.english: Now that it's become reality, it feels suffocating, and I'm starting to look for a reason...
1100701901.korean: 현실이 되니까 갑갑해져서 이유를 찾게 되네…

1100701903.english: The priestess of justice and beauty! Koyori! Here I am!

1100701905.english: I'm doing that to keep my sanity because I feel like I'm going crazy. Why?
1100701905.korean: 미칠 거 같으니까 정신 다잡으려고 그런다, 왜?

1100701906.english: We've saved the world countless times, we can't be this discouraged!
1100701906.korean: 우리가 세계를 몇 번이나 구했는데, 이 정도로 좌절할 수는 없지!

1100701907.english: Even if you saved the world, it's just in the story...
1100701907.korean: 세계를 구했다고 해도 어차피 작품 속의…

1100701909.english: That's right. I've saved the world countless times. I can't be discouraged by something so trivial.
1100701909.korean: 그렇지. 세계를 몇 번이나 구했는데. 고작 이 정도로 좌절할 수는 없지.

1100701910.english: But every time I saved the world, you were nothing but a series of frustrations.
1100701910.korean: 하지만 제가 세계를 구할 때마다 댁은 좌절의 연속이었잖아요.

1100701911.english: I was about to object, but I agreed with you instead. And now you're trying to take sides here?
1100701911.korean: 반박하다 말고 네 말에 동조해줬는데, 여기서 편 가르기를 한다고?

1100701913.english: Yeah. I can't be defeated by something like this.
1100701913.korean: 응. 이 정도로 좌절할 수는 없지.

1100701914.english: If you give up, it's all over right there.

1100701915.english: The darker the night, the brighter the light appears, and heroes shine in adversity.
1100701915.korean: 어둠이 짙을수록 빛은 더욱 밝게 보이고, 영웅은 역경 속에서 활약을 하는 법.

1100701916.english: This is a chance to widely publicize our names, which were made as actors, and since we're playing the role of heroes, we can't just stand by and watch evil run rampant.
1100701916.korean: 배우로 만들어진 우리의 이름을 널릴 알릴 기회이고, 영웅의 역할을 맡았기에 악의 횡행을 그냥 보고만 있을 수는 없지.

1100701917.english: You're not talking about the reward money.

1100701918.english: That will come naturally as you defeat the monsters.

1100701921.english: Hey! Let's not nitpick and argue over something we did jokingly, like dividing into teams!
1100701921.korean: 거! 농담삼아 편가르기 했다고 시시콜콜 따지지 맙시다!

1100701923.english: Shouldn't I also take a break and refresh my mood?
1100701923.korean: 나도 기분전환 좀 해야 하지 않겠나.

1100701924.english: Let's go, we need to save the survivors.

1100701926.english: Oh my, Koyori. What's the matter?

1100701927.english: Um... I have a question I'd like to ask.
1100701927.korean: 음… 저기 물어보고 싶은 게 있는데.

1100701928.english: Can I get permission to go out?

1100701929.english: Absolutely, if there's a valid reason. What's the matter?
1100701929.korean: 합당한 이유가 있다면 얼마든지요. 무슨 일이신가요?

1100701931.english: I'd like to take a look around the Dentsu branch I used to work at.
1100701931.korean: 내가 있던 덴세츠 지국을 좀 둘러보고 싶어서.

1100701932.english: The Densetsu branch where Koyori was?

1100701934.english: Just in case there are any remaining genetic seeds.
1100701934.korean: 혹시나 남은 유전자 씨앗이 있을까 싶어서.

1100701937.english: Ah, it's not working after all.

1100701938.english: Sorry for taking up your time.

1100701939.english: You can't go alone because you might encounter Iron Beasts.
1100701939.korean: 철충과 마주칠 수 있으니까 혼자 가시는 건 안돼요.

1100701940.english: I'll speak to Master and see if I can ask others to accompany you.
1100701940.korean: 주인님께 말씀드려서 다른 분들이 동행하도록 부탁드려볼게요.

1100701941.english: If you're Master, you'll gladly grant Koyori's request.
1100701941.korean: 주인님이시라면 흔쾌히 코요리의 부탁을 들어주실 거예요.

1100701942.english: There are safety concerns, and wouldn't it be easier to find if we went together?
1100701942.korean: 안전 문제도 있고 여럿이 함께 찾는다면 더 쉽게 찾을 수 있지 않겠어요?

1100701943.english: Oh, I'm starting to feel bad, so then...

1100701944.english: Hehe, you don't need to apologize. Because it's natural to help someone if they need it.
1100701944.korean: 후후, 미안해 하실 필요는 없어요. 누군가가 도움이 필요하면 돕는 게 당연하니까요.

1100701945.english: The sun is still high, so since we're talking about it, let's go ask now.
1100701945.korean: 아직 해가 중천이니 말이 나온 김에 지금 부탁드리러 가죠.

1100701946.english: - The technical team repairing the Orca came to see me for an interim report.
1100701946.korean: - 오르카 호를 수리하는 기술진들이 중간 보고를 위해 나를 찾아왔다.

1100701947.english: The repair of the Orca is progressing smoothly, you know?
1100701947.korean: 오르카 호 수리는 순조롭게 진행되고 있거든?

1100701948.english: Equipment that is severely damaged beyond repair is being completely rebuilt.
1100701948.korean: 수리가 불가능할 정도로 심각하게 고장난 장비는 아예 새로 만들고 있어요.

1100701949.english: Heh heh, so it's not just about repairs, we're also working on improvements to get even better performance.
1100701949.korean: 후후, 그래서 단순히 수리에서 끝나는 게 아니라 좀 더 나은 성능을 보여줄 수 있게 개량작업도 병행하고 있거든.

1100701950.english: If you look at the blueprint here...

1100701951.english: - The excited engineers grabbed me and started explaining enthusiastically.
1100701951.korean: - 신이 난 기술진들은 나를 붙잡고 열심히 설명하기 시작했다.

1100701952.english: - I didn't understand half of it, but I couldn't resist the passion of the technical staff, so I had to nod my head vigorously as if I understood.
1100701952.korean: - 나는 반도 이해 못했지만 기술진들의 열정을 이기지 못하고 알아들은 척 고개를 열심히 끄덕여야만 했다.

1100701953.english: Um, Master? Are you very busy?

1100701954.english: - So, when the hand of salvation reached down, I almost cried from joy.
1100701954.korean: - 그래서 구원의 손길이 내려오자 반가움에 눈물이 날 뻔했다.

1100701955.english: Koyori said she wants to look around the Densetsu branch office.
1100701955.korean: 코요리가 덴세츠 지국을 둘러보고 싶다고 해서요.

1100701956.english: I was hoping there might be some genetic seeds left.

1100701957.english: That's true, but there are a few hidden places in the branch office. You know, like a safe or a shelter.
1100701957.korean: 그렇긴 한데 지국에 숨겨진 장소가 몇 군데 있거든. 금고라던가 셸터라던가 그런 곳 말이야.

1100701958.english: It was so thoroughly hidden that it might not have been found.
1100701958.korean: 워낙에 철저하게 숨겨져서 발견 못 했을 수도 있잖아.

1100701959.english: And if you go alone and encounter a Steel Bug, it could be dangerous, so I think it would be better if others accompanied you as well.
1100701959.korean: 그리고 만약에 혼자 갔다가 철충과 마주치면 위험할 수도 있으니 다른 분들도 동행을 하면 좋을 것 같아서요.

1100701960.english: - It wasn't that busy, and it seemed like a request that shouldn't cause any problems.
1100701960.korean: - 크게 바쁘지도 않았고, 무슨 문제가 있을 것 같지도 않은 부탁이었다.

1100701961.english: - And I also remembered how lonely Koyo looked when she was left alone during her first interview.
1100701961.korean: - 그리고 나는 코요리와 첫 면담 때 혼자 남았다고 쓸쓸해하는 모습도 떠올렸다.

1100701964.english: - Koyori was overjoyed and ran outside.

1100701965.english: - Her longing was palpable in her actions.
1100701965.korean: - 그녀의 행동에서 그녀의 갈망이 얼마나 큰지 느껴졌다.

1100701966.english: I hope I won't be disappointed if there aren't any remaining genetic seeds...
1100701966.korean: 혹여나… 남은 유전자 씨앗이 없어서 실망하면 안 될 텐데…

1100701967.english: And also tell them how good the Orca crew are, right?
1100701967.korean: 그리고 오르카의 대원들이 얼마나 좋은 사람들인지도 알려주고요?

1100701968.english: - We looked at each other and smiled.

1100701969.english: Then I'll get back to work now, Master.
1100701969.korean: 그러면 저는 이만 업무로 돌아갈게요, 주인님.

1100701970.english: - After Constantia left, I sank deep into my chair.
1100701970.korean: - 콘스탄챠가 떠나고 나는 의자에 깊숙이 몸을 묻었다.

1100701971.english: - I pray that Koyori finds what she was looking for.
1100701971.korean: - 부디 코요리가 원하던 것을 찾을 수 있기를 빌며.

1100701972.english: Then, may I continue the explanation, Commander?

1100701973.english: I still have a lot more to explain, you know?

1100701975.english: - Just as I was finally escaping the seemingly endless explanations from the technicians and trying to compose myself...
1100701975.korean: - 끝없이 이어질 것 같았던 기술진들의 설명에서 간신히 벗어나서 몸을 추스리고 있을 때.

1100701977.english: - With a large sack slung over her shoulder.

1100701979.english: - Koyori smiled broadly and showed the contents of the sack.
1100701979.korean: - 코요리는 함박웃음을 지으며 자루의 내용물을 보여줬다.

1100701980.english: - The sack was full of yellow gold coins.

1100701981.english: This is the gold coin I used when filming my work!
1100701981.korean: 내 작품 찍을 때 썼던 금화야!

1100701982.english: As befitting a prop from Densetsu, it's not a fake, but a real gold coin with 99.9% purity!
1100701982.korean: 덴세츠의 소품답게 가짜가 아니라 순도 99.9%의 진짜 금화!

1100701983.english: - But I don't remember going to look for gold coins.
1100701983.korean: - 그런데 금화를 찾으러 갔던 건 아닌 걸로 기억하는데.

1100701986.english: Just one! There was really one left! Even the genetic seed of the kid who was in the same work as me!
1100701986.korean: 딱 하나! 진짜로 하나가 남아있었어! 심지어 나랑 같은 작품에 나왔던 애의 유전자 씨앗!

1100701987.english: As soon as I got back to the submarine, I went to the recovery center and gave it to them!

1100701988.english: - Koyori's joyful laughter brought a smile to my face as well.
1100701988.korean: - 코요리의 기쁨에 찬 웃음에 나도 절로 미소가 지어졌다

1100701990.english: Have you played the game I was in?

1100701991.english: So, which works did I appear in?

1100701993.english: They say that hearing something a hundred times is not as good as seeing it once, seeing something a hundred times is not as good as thinking about it once, and thinking about something a hundred times is not as good as doing it once, right?
1100701993.korean: 백 번 듣는 것이 한 번 보는 것보다 못하며, 백 번 보는 것이 한 번 생각하는 것보다 못하고, 백 번 생각하는 것이 한 번 행하는 것보다 못하다고 하잖아?

1100701994.english: You'll understand it better if you play the game and watch the work, and then listen to the explanation.
1100701994.korean: 게임을 하고 작품을 본 후에 설명을 들으면 더 잘 알 수 있을거야.

1100701996.english: I didn't know there was a hidden shelter here...

1100701997.english: Don't blame yourself for not finding it.

1100701998.english: Because the architect of this building is so eccentric, there are a lot of these playful structures.
1100701998.korean: 이 건물 설계자가 워낙에 변태스러워서 이런 장난 같은 구조물이 많으니까.

1100701999.english: I was also unsure, but it seems my suspicions were correct.

1100702000.english: Instead, there will be plenty of treasures.
1100702000.korean: 대신에 보물 같은 것은 잔뜩 있을 거야.

1100702001.english: Like gene seeds or gold coins.
1100702001.korean: 유전자 씨앗이라던가, 금화 같은 거 말이야.

1100702002.english: What good are gold coins in a time like this?
1100702002.korean: 이런 시대에 금화가 무슨 가치가 있겠어?

1100702003.english: As long as it's enough for industrial use, that's fine.

1100702004.english: Why? Gold coins are great, aren't they? Just looking at the sparkling appearance makes me feel good.
1100702004.korean: 왜? 금화 좋잖아. 반짝반짝 거리는 모습만 봐도 기분이 좋아지는 걸.

1100702005.english: Even if you happen to find a bag of gold coins, I won't help you move it.
1100702005.korean: 만에 하나 금화자루를 발견해도 옮기는 건 안 도와줄 거야.

1100702006.english: I don't intend to have our unit members exert themselves on something like that.
1100702006.korean: 그런 데에 우리 부대원들 힘 쓰게 할 생각 없어.

1100702007.english: Then that's even better. Because I'm the only one who gets to have it.
1100702007.korean: 그러면 더 좋고. 나만 독점하는 거니까.

1100702009.english: You could call me a connoisseur...

1100702011.english: Where did you come in from!?

1100702014.english: The priestess of justice and beauty! Koyori appears!

1100702018.english: The priestess of justice and beauty! Koyori and others! Long!
1100702018.korean: 정의와 미모의 무녀! 코요리 등! 장!

1100702020.english: They won't even take it anymore. Alright!

1100702021.english: You can only take so much.

1100702022.english: The other kids are still accepting them, aren't they?

1100702023.english: Are the other kids still alive?

1100702026.english: ...The mixed unit that was defending the city had also been wiped out.

1100702027.english: You've held out for a long time.

1100702029.english: How long can we hold out?

1100702032.english: Don't we also have to fight endless enemies until we die because of the final order?
1100702032.korean: 우리들도 마지막 명령 때문에 끝이 없는 적과 죽을 때까지 싸워야하지 않나.

1100702034.english: I'll take care of this. Go back to the branch office right now.
1100702034.korean: 여기는 내가 맡을 테니까. 지금 당장 지국으로 돌아가.

1100702035.english: Haven't you been back to the branch office in almost a month?
1100702035.korean: 너 지국에 안 돌아간지 한 달 가까이 됐지?

1100702036.english: Go back to the base, eat a hearty meal, wash with warm water, and get some good rest.
1100702036.korean: 지국으로 돌아가서 든든히 먹고, 따뜻한 물로 씻고, 푹 쉬고.

1100702037.english: And while I'm at it, I'll upload my memories too.

1100702038.english: When I'm not feeling well, I tend to think negative thoughts.
1100702038.korean: 컨디션이 안 좋으니 불길한 생각을 하지.

1100702039.english: It's not an ominous thought, it's a realistic one.

1100702041.english: Even if all humans die, the androids will remain!

1100702045.english: We exist to leave a lasting impression on the audience, no matter how hard we have to struggle!
1100702045.korean: 아둥바둥 어떻게든 관객들의 기억속에 우리를 남기는 것이 우리의 존재의의라고!

1100702046.english: Not just about the two of us, but also about the other kids!
1100702046.korean: 우리 둘뿐만 아니라 다른 애들에 대한 것도!

1100702047.english: Are you going to disappear just like you never existed because it feels empty?
1100702047.korean: 허무하다고 이대로 그냥 존재하지 않았던 것처럼 사라질 거야?

1100702050.english: If you understand, go back to the branch office, eat, wash up, and rest, then come back.
1100702050.korean: 알겠으면 지국으로 돌아가서 먹고 씻고 쉬고 와.

1100702053.english: - I was so engrossed in the games and works where Koyori appeared that when I suddenly looked at the clock, it was time for the sun to set.
1100702053.korean: - 코요리가 등장했던 게임과 작품에 정신이 팔렸다가 문득 시계를 보니 해가 질 시간이었다.

1100702054.english: - It was about time for Constantia to bring dinner, so I got out of bed where I had been lying lazily.
1100702054.korean: - 슬슬 콘스탄챠가 저녁식사를 가져올 시간이었기에 나태하게 누워있던 침대에서 벗어났다.

1100702055.english: - I waited for a long time like that, but Constantia didn't appear.
1100702055.korean: - 그렇게 한참을 기다렸지만 콘스탄챠는 나타나지 않았다.

1100702056.english: - I couldn't resist my hunger and curiosity, so I left the room.
1100702056.korean: - 나는 배고픔과 궁금증을 이기지 못해 방을 나섰다.

1100702057.english: - A significant number of crew members had landed on land, so the Orca was relatively quiet.
1100702057.korean: - 적지 않은 대원들이 육지에 상륙한 상태라 오르카 호는 한산했다.

1100702058.english: - I asked the scattered members about Constantia's whereabouts, but none of them knew.
1100702058.korean: - 드문드문 보이는 대원들에게 콘스탄챠의 행방에 대해서 물었지만 아는 대원이 없었다.

1100702059.english: - When I went to the kitchen, my cold dinner was on the cart, but I couldn't see Constantia.
1100702059.korean: - 주방에 들르니 식어버린 내 저녁밥이 카트에 실려 있었지만 콘스탄챠는 보이지 않았다.

1100702061.english: - There's no way Constantia would have disappeared without saying a word.
1100702061.korean: - 콘스탄챠가 아무런 말도 없이 사라질 리 없었다.

1100702062.english: - I frantically searched the Orca, going around and around, looking for Constantia.
1100702062.korean: - 나는 콘스탄챠를 찾기 위해 분주히 오르카 호를 돌아다녔다.

1100702063.english: - At first, I walked, but my impatient heart quickened my pace, soon turning into a brisk walk, and eventually, I was running around the Orca.
1100702063.korean: - 처음에는 걸었지만 조급해진 마음이 발걸음을 재촉해 이내 빠른 걸음으로, 결국에는 오르카 호를 뛰어다녔다.

1100702064.english: - Speaking urgently to the crew members I saw here and there, I found a place where Constantia might be.
1100702064.korean: - 중간중간에 보이는 대원들에게 다급하게 말하며 나는 콘스탄챠가 있을 법한 곳을 찾았다.

1100702065.english: - However, Constantia was nowhere to be seen.
1100702065.korean: - 그러나 그 어디에도 콘스탄챠는 보이지 않았다.

1100702066.english: - Wandering around Orca Hall so haphazardly, I finally arrived at the restoration room.
1100702066.korean: - 그렇게 마구잡이로 오르카호를 돌아다니던 나는 복원실에 도착했다.

1100702067.english: - And the one lying on the floor of the restoration room...

1100702069.korean: - 불행 중 다행으로 둘은 숨을 쉬고 있었다.

1100702071.english: - It wasn't long before Koyori woke up.

1100702074.english: - Just before I was about to ask about Constantia's whereabouts.
1100702074.korean: - 내가 콘스탄챠의 행방에 대해서 묻기 직전.

1100702078.english: - I immediately declared a state of emergency and formed a search team.
1100702078.korean: - 나는 즉시 비상상황을 선포하고 추적조를 구성했다.

1100702079.english: - And while the tracking team was being formed, Koyori explained what had happened.
1100702079.korean: - 그리고 추적조가 구성되는 동안 코요리가 무슨 일이 있었는지 밝혔다.

1100702080.english: As soon as my old colleague was restored, I went to meet them with Constantia.
1100702080.korean: 내 옛 동료가 복원이 되자마자 콘스탄챠랑 같이 만나러 갔어.

1100702081.english: But as soon as she saw Constantia, she subdued us and kidnaped her.
1100702081.korean: 그런데 걔가 콘스탄챠를 보자마자 우리를 제압하고 콘스탄챠를 납치해갔어.

1100702082.english: I let my guard down... I wouldn't have been taken down so easily otherwise.

1100702083.english: - Before I could finish speaking, Koyori asked.
1100702083.korean: - 내 말이 끝나기도 전에 코요리가 물었다.

1100702084.english: Commander. Do you know what the plot of the Blade series is nationwide?
1100702084.korean: 사령관. 전국 블레이드의 줄거리가 어떻게 되는지 알아?

1100702085.english: - As I said that, I got goosebumps.

1100702086.english: They're probably doing that as a sacrifice.

1100702087.english: We are androids created by Densetsu.

1100702089.english: So, for a more realistic performance, it's made with the basic roles we're given being believed to be real.
1100702089.korean: 그래서 더 사실적인 연출을 위해서 기본적으로 우리에게 주어진 역할이 진짜라고 믿는 채로 만들어져.

1100702090.english: She probably believes her role is real too.
1100702090.korean: 아마 그 녀석도 자신의 배역이 진짜라고 믿고 있을거야.

1100702091.english: - Having played the national blade and seen the live-action adaptation, I could guess who the guy Koyori was talking about was.
1100702091.korean: - 전국 블레이드를 플레이하고 실사화 작품도 본 나는 코요리가 말하는 그 녀석이 누구인지 짐작이 갔다.

1100702092.english: - But I asked just to be sure.

1100702093.english: - Koyori didn't keep the secret even in this situation.
1100702093.korean: - 코요리는 이런 상황에서까지 비밀을 고수하지 않았다.

1100702094.english: The enemy who stood in my way in the national Blade tournament. One of the Four Heavenly Kings' demon guards.
1100702094.korean: 전국 블레이드에서 나의 앞을 가로막았던 적. 사천왕 귀도중의 일원.

1100702095.english: I'm Kaen, the Crimson Demon Princess.

1100702097.english: However, even if the sun's light disappears, as long as the goddess Artemis's grace is with me, you cannot escape my pursuit.
1100702097.korean: 그러나 태양의 빛이 사라지더라도 아르테미스 여신의 은혜가 있는 이상 저의 추적을 벗어날 수 없습니다.

1100702098.english: But, the trace. I couldn't find it.

1100702099.english: Ugh! If we could find even a trace, we could follow it like a thread and track them down.
1100702099.korean: 큭! 일말의 흔적만이라도 찾을 수 있다면 실타래를 따라가듯이 추적할 수 있는데.

1100702102.english: Koyori, the shrine maiden of justice and beauty.

1100702103.english: This is Atalanta, the greatest female warrior and armed princess of Greece.
1100702103.korean: 그리스 최고의 여전사이자 무장 공주 아탈란테입니다.

1100702104.english: The kunoichi, Kaen, of the withered Muromachi flower...

1100702108.english: Just like they're from Densetsu... why are they so showy?
1100702108.korean: 누가 덴세츠 출신들 아니랄까 봐… 자기 과시가 왜 이리 심해…

1100702109.english: It's not my place to say this, but...

1100702110.english: Anyway, isn't this enough for introductions?

1100702113.english: No... not you... the Kaen we're tracking. You know why you're doing this...
1100702113.korean: 아니… 너 말고… 우리가 추적하고 있는 카엔. 알면서 왜 그래…

1100702115.english: Ugh! Shamefully... I couldn't even find a trace, let alone pinpoint their location.
1100702115.korean: 큭! 수치스럽게도… 위치 파악은커녕 흔적도 못 찾았습니다.

1100702116.english: Don't just look at the ground, look up a bit higher.
1100702116.korean: 땅만 보지 말고 좀 더 시선을 위로 올려.

1100702117.english: That guy can fly too, you know.
1100702117.korean: 그 녀석도 비행도 할 수 있는 녀석이니까.

1100702119.english: How do you know about our target?
1100702119.korean: 어떻게 우리 추적 대상에 대해서 알고 있는 거죠?

1100702120.english: Let's at least get familiar with the works from the same company... huh?
1100702120.korean: 같은 회사 작품은 좀 파악하고 있자… 응?

1100702121.english: ...This isn't something I should be saying either, but...

1100702122.english: Because she was in the same work as me.

1100702123.english: Are you a colleague of the person being tracked?

1100702124.english: Since we were in the same work, if you say "colleague," then yes, you could call us colleagues.
1100702124.korean: 같은 작품에 나왔으니까 동료…라고 한다면 동료라고 할 수 있지.

1100702125.english: But in terms of their roles, they were enemies.

1100702126.english: We've been fighting for a long time.

1100702128.english: Why are you looking at me with such suspicious eyes?
1100702128.korean: 왜 그렇게 의심에 찬 눈으로 보고 있어?

1100702129.english: If a Bioroid you've never met suddenly appears and says they'll help, of course you're going to be suspicious, aren't you?
1100702129.korean: 초면의 바이오로이드가 갑자기 나타나서 도와준다고 말하면 당연히 의심이 갈 수밖에 없지 않습니까.

1100702130.english: Oh! I'm really part of Orca! Why are you so on edge?
1100702130.korean: 아! 나 오르카 소속 맞다고! 왜 그렇게 날이 서 있어?

1100702131.english: Do I need to say more about the motivation?

1100702132.english: You made the mistake, you fix it!

1100702133.english: This incident happened because I restored Kaen.
1100702133.korean: 이번 사태는 내가 카엔을 복원시키면서 일어난 일이야.

1100702134.english: Of course, shouldn't I be the one to solve it?

1100702135.english: Oh, that guy keeps running away while I'm doing this!
1100702135.korean: 아, 이러는 동안에 그 녀석 계속 도망가잖아!

1100702136.english: If time runs out, it's a bad ending!

1100702138.english: To be continued in Part 2 of < Curtain Call After the Apocalypse >.

1100702141.english: Okay. Then let's head to the nearest city.
1100702141.korean: 알겠어. 그러면 가장 가까운 도시로 향하자.

1100702143.english: It's more of a tour than an exploration, isn't it?

1100702144.english: What? It would be good to explore while we're at it.

1100702145.english: Please upload a detailed reconnaissance report.

1100702146.english: If it gets dangerous, don't push yourself and retreat immediately.

1100702147.english: It'll be fine there, Valhalla went.

1100702149.english: How's the situation at the Densetsu branch?

1100702152.english: It's Leona, so it'll be fine.

1100702153.english: Okay. Please report any special circumstances.

1100702156.english: Since you're a legend expert... please investigate the branch office with me.

1100702157.english: Hello, Koyori. I am the commander of the Orca.

1100702159.english: It's okay, we have everyone from Orca.

1100702163.english: Um... Lumberjane is there, isn't it?

1100702167.english: Yeah. I'll do it when I have time.

1100702169.english: Haven't Valhalla and Hraesvelgr already checked?

1100702170.english: There's no reason it shouldn't work.

1100702171.english: I'll let them know since Valhalla will still be nearby.
1100702171.korean: 발할라가 아직 근처에 있을 거니까 연락해 놓을게.

1100702172.english: Then I should comfort them diligently.

1100702175.english: Did you find what you were looking for?

1100702177.english: Did you find the gene seed?

1100702183.english: Did you see Constantia? Tell Constantia I'm looking for her!
1100702183.korean: 콘스탄챠 봤어? 콘스탄챠 보면 내가 찾는다고 전해줘!

1100702187.english: Rescue the kidnaped princess to revive Lee Gye-hwang-
1100702187.korean: 이계황의 부활을 위해 납치된 공주님을 구출-

1100702189.english: But that's just a story in a game-

1100702190.english: What's the deal with the gene seeds you brought from the branch office?
1100702190.korean: 지국에서 가져온 유전자 씨앗의 정체가 뭐야?

1100702194.english: In the works I appeared in, I was never considered for anything other than the villain. So I just watched the other actors having a good time. But right now, you are... Me... That's pleasing. I might disappoint you, but I will do my best to show you a good performance anyway. I look forward to working with you.
1100702194.korean: 내가 등장했던 작품에서 나는 악역 외에는 전혀 상정되지 않았다. 그래서 다른 배우들이 즐거운 시간을 보내는 것을 보기만 했었지. 그런데 지금 너는... 나를... 기쁘게 하는군. 실망스러운 모습을 보여줄지도 모르지만 그래도 좋은 모습을 보여주기 위해 최선을 다하겠다. 잘 부탁하지.

1100702195.english: My master loves me whether I'm human or not, puts a ring on my finger, and hugs me tightly like this, telling me they love me. I love you too, Master. I promise to love only you, my lord, forever, until many years have passed and our children create a new history once more.
1100702195.korean: 주인님은 제가 인간이든 아니든 상관없이 저를 사랑해 주시고, 반지를 끼워주시고, 이렇게 꼬옥 안겨서 제게 사랑한다고 말해주시네요. 저도 사랑해요 주인님. 오랜 세월이 지나고, 우리의 아이들이 다시 새로운 역사를 만들 때까지, 영원히 주인님만을 사랑할 것을 약속드릴게요.

1100702197.english: - We've put all available personnel on tracking down the kidnaped Constantia.
1100702197.korean: - 납치당한 콘스탄챠를 구하기 위해 가용가능한 인원을 전부 추적으로 돌렸다.

1100702198.english: - However, except for the landing point and parts of the city, it was still under the control of the Iron Blooded Ones, so we couldn't form the main combat unit into a pursuit team.
1100702198.korean: - 하지만 상륙 지점과 도시 일부를 제외하면 아직 철충의 세력권이었기에 주력 전투 부대까지 추적조로 구성할 수는 없었다.

1100702199.english: - Ultimately, they had no choice but to create several small tracking teams, composed of a few people each, and begin the pursuit, all while being careful not to provoke the Iron Blooded.
1100702199.korean: - 결국 철충을 자극하지 않는 선에서 소수의 인원으로 구성된 추적조를 여럿 만들어 추적에 나설 수밖에 없었다.

1100702200.english: - I gave the order calmly, but only my demeanor was calm.
1100702200.korean: - 침착하게 명령을 내렸지만 침착한 것은 태도만이다.

1100702201.english: - I was so anxious that I felt like running out and tracking it down myself right away.
1100702201.korean: - 너무 초조해서 당장이라도 뛰쳐나가 직접 추적하고 싶은 마음이었다.

1100702202.english: - I remembered the motive for Kaen's kidnapping that Koyori had mentioned.
1100702202.korean: - 나는 코요리가 말한 카엔의 납치 동기를 떠올렸다.

1100702204.english: - I snapped at the person who had been kidnaped and was not present.
1100702204.korean: - 이 자리에 없는 납치 당사자에게 쏘아붙였다.

1100702205.english: - But a shout that had no one to hear it simply faded away into emptiness.
1100702205.korean: - 하지만 들어야 할 이가 없는 외침은 공허하게 사그라들 뿐이었다.

1100702207.english: - Lilith looked at me with worried eyes.
1100702207.korean: - 리리스가 걱정이 가득한 눈으로 날 바라보았다.

1100702208.english: - I wanted to say I was okay, but I didn't tell an obvious lie that anyone could see through.
1100702208.korean: - 괜찮다고 말하고 싶었지만 누가 봐도 뻔한 거짓말은 하지 않았다.

1100702209.english: Yes, I checked it first as per your command, Master...
1100702209.korean: 네, 주인님의 명령대로 제일 먼저 확인을 해봤는데…

1100702210.english: We couldn't see the target's face on any of the security cameras.
1100702210.korean: 보안 카메라 어디에도 목표의 모습을 확인할 수 없었어요.

1100702211.english: The Orca is currently undergoing upgrades, so some of the security systems aren't working.
1100702211.korean: 지금 오르카 호 개량 작업이 진행되느라 몇몇 보안 장치가 작동을 하지 않고 있어요.

1100702212.english: As the head of security... I have no face. I'm sorry, Master.

1100702213.english: - While I do look out for the safety of the other members out of camaraderie, Lilith's top priority is my safety.
1100702213.korean: - 동료애로서 다른 대원들의 안전도 챙기기는 하지만 리리스의 최우선 목표는 나의 안전이다.

1100702214.english: - And most security devices focus on preventing external intrusions. Going from the inside to the outside was relatively lax.
1100702214.korean: - 그리고 대부분의 보안 장치는 외부의 침입을 막는 것에 중점을 두고 있다. 내부에서 외부로 나가는 것은 비교적 허술했다.

1100702215.english: - Moreover, since most of the crew members were currently ashore, there were no witnesses.
1100702215.korean: - 더군다나 지금 대부분의 대원들이 육지에 상륙한 상태이기에 목격자도 없었다.

1100702216.english: - Except for Koyori, who is one of the parties involved.
1100702216.korean: - 당사자 중 한 명인 코요리를 제외하면 말이다.

1100702217.english: - That coyote provided us with as much information as possible about Kaen and then set off to track her down directly.
1100702217.korean: - 그 코요리는 우리에게 카엔에 대한 정보를 최대한 제공한 후 직접 추적에 나섰다.

1100702219.english: This incident happened because I brought back Kaen's genetic seed and restored it.
1100702219.korean: 이번 사건은 내가 카엔의 유전자 씨앗을 가져와서 복원 시켜서 일어난 일이야.

1100702220.english: And since I'm familiar with this area and also familiar with Kaen, it would be a good idea for me to join the pursuit.
1100702220.korean: 그리고 이 근방은 익숙하고, 카엔에 대한 것도 익숙하니까 나도 추적에 나서는 게 좋을거야.

1100702221.english: I'm sorry. No matter what happens, I will save Constantia.
1100702221.korean: 미안해. 무슨 일이 있어도 콘스탄챠는 내가 구해올게.

1100702222.english: - I understood and belatedly added Koyori to the investigation team.
1100702222.korean: - 나는 납득하고 뒤늦게 코요리를 추적조에 합류시켰다.

1100702223.english: - And then, belatedly, I felt a strange sensation.
1100702223.korean: - 그리고 뒤늦게 나는 기묘한 느낌을 받았다.

1100702224.english: - It's a bit different, but isn't it similar to the situation with the National Blade?
1100702224.korean: - 조금 다르기는 하지만 전국 블레이드와 비슷한 상황이지 않은가.

1100702225.english: - The princess is Constantia, and the enemy is only Kaen, but the flow itself...
1100702225.korean: - 공주는 콘스탄챠, 적은 카엔 뿐이지만 흐름 자체는 말이다.

1100702226.english: Master? Excuse me, but may I say a word?
1100702226.korean: 주인님? 외람되지만 한 마디 올려도 될까요?

1100702228.english: - Lilith told me about her suspicions.

1100702229.english: - After hearing Lilith's words, I thought her suspicions were justified.
1100702229.korean: - 리리스의 말을 들은 나는 리리스의 의혹이 합당하다고 생각했다.

1100702230.english: So much time has passed, but these things just won't shrink, they just won't.
1100702230.korean: 세월이 그렇게 흘렀는데 이것들은 줄어들지가 않아요, 줄어들지가.

1100702231.english: Still, since they're all Densetsu kids, they fight well.
1100702231.korean: 그래도 전부 덴세츠 애들이라 그런지 잘 싸우네.

1100702232.english: It feels a bit lacking to sing of glory with just this much.
1100702232.korean: 고작 이 정도로 영광을 노래하기에는 부족한 감이 없잖아 있군요.

1100702234.english: However, our goal isn't to hunt the Iron Blooded, but to track down the villains who kidnaped the head maid.
1100702234.korean: 하지만 우리의 목적은 철충 사냥이 아니라 메이드장을 납치한 악당을 추적하는 것입니다.

1100702235.english: The villain and... Constantia's traces... I don't see them.

1100702236.english: Even with the moon so bright, I can't find any trace of the prey... My pride as a hunter serving the goddess Artemis is completely shattered...
1100702236.korean: 달이 이렇게 밝은데도 사냥감의 흔적을 찾지 못하다니… 아르테미스 여신님을 모시는 사냥꾼의 자존심이 산산히 부서지는군요…

1100702238.english: That guy was also made by Densetsu just like us, so her skills are the real deal.
1100702238.korean: 그 녀석도 우리랑 마찬가지로 덴세츠에서 만들어져서 실력은 진짜니까 말이야.

1100702239.english: They said she was the most difficult of the Four Heavenly Kings.

1100702240.english: The Four Heavenly Kings? Are there more colleagues at the goal?

1100702241.english: No, that's just what I mean.

1100702242.english: And three of the Four Heavenly Kings were played by human actors because they were male.
1100702242.korean: 그리고 사천왕 중 세 명은 남자라서 인간 배우였다니까.

1100702243.english: What can you do? You're only human. There are no genetic seeds, and it's already dead.
1100702243.korean: 인간이니 어쩔 수 있나. 유전자 씨앗도 없고, 이미 죽었고.

1100702244.english: If you want to know more, watch the games and works I appear in.
1100702244.korean: 더 자세히 알고 싶으면 내가 등장하는 게임이랑 작품을 봐.

1100702245.english: Wow! Even if humanity were to perish, they'd still be a top-notch employe, thoroughly advertising.
1100702245.korean: 크! 인류가 멸망해도 광고는 철저히 하는 우수 직원이네.

1100702246.english: That's why I don't feel guilty even when I get gold coins as a bonus.
1100702246.korean: 이러니 보너스로 금화 챙겨도 양심의 가책을 안 받는다니까.

1100702248.english: Oh, do you see that broken branch over there?
1100702248.korean: 아, 저기 나뭇가지가 꺾인 거 보여?

1100702249.english: The branches are bent in a certain direction.

1100702250.english: And looking at the broken part, it's a recent mark.
1100702250.korean: 그리고 꺾인 부분을 보니 오래되지 않은 흔적입니다.

1100702251.english: It seems you've found a trace of the target.

1100702252.english: I'm going to pick up the pace from now on.

1100702255.english: Even in difficult terrain... my steps... don't slow down.

1100702258.english: It's right that I'm the one who's active!

1100702263.english: Justice and... the beautiful shrine maiden... Koyori... appear.

1100702270.english: I said I felt relieved because my life didn't depend on the script.
1100702270.korean: 대본에 따라 생사가 갈리는 일이 없어서… 마음이 편하다고 했었지.

1100702271.english: ...and she also said it was terrible that death was determined by the will of others, and that one had to walk into the death that was determined.
1100702271.korean: ……타자의 의지에 따라 죽음이 정해지고, 정해진 죽음으로 걸어들어가는 것은 끔찍하다고도 했고.

1100702277.english: Originally, in our work, it was decided that I, the villain, would die.
1100702277.korean: 원래 우리 작품에서 악역인 나는 죽는 것이 정해져 있었지.

1100702278.english: But on the other hand, you and the other protagonists lived.
1100702278.korean: 하지만 반대로 너와 다른 주인공들은 살았지.

1100702279.english: No, not only that, but the staff and our audience didn't die either.
1100702279.korean: 아니, 그 뿐만 아니라 스태프들도, 우리의 관객도 죽을 일은 없었다.

1100702281.english: The audience we were supposed to protect, and the staff, they're all dead.
1100702281.korean: 우리가 지켜야 할 관객들도, 스태프들도 전부 죽었고.

1100702282.english: Because of the final order to create a heroic tale, our comrades continued fighting endlessly, dying one by one, until only we were left, weren't we?
1100702282.korean: 영웅담을 만들라는 마지막 명령 때문에 동료들도 끝이 없는 싸움을 계속하다가 하나둘 죽어가다가 우리만 남지 않았나.

1100702284.english: Rather than struggling to survive in a desperate situation and watching everyone die...
1100702284.korean: 절망적인 상황에서 아등바등 살아남으며 모두가 죽는 것을 보는 것보다는…

1100702285.english: I want to choose to meet the death that is destined for the villain.
1100702285.korean: 악역으로 정해진 죽음을 맞이하는 것을 선택하고 싶다.

1100702288.english: ...The Iron Blooded swarm is coming again.

1100702289.english: Perhaps... this will be our last time.

1100702292.english: Can I ask you a favor?

1100702297.english: Let's bring our heroic tale to a close.

1100702298.english: You'd think they were an actor.

1100702299.english: You're still looking sharp until the very end.

1100702301.english: It would have been better if I had died as an actor.

1100702304.english: What do you mean, "Don't die before me"?

1100702305.english: Then what am I supposed to be left with?

1100702306.english: Just like a villain! I just went and died on my own!
1100702306.korean: 누가 악역 아니랄까 봐! 자기 멋대로 먼저 죽어버리고!

1100702307.english: Because of that request, I survived against my will too!
1100702307.korean: 그 부탁 때문에 나도 억지로 살아남았잖아!

1100702308.english: ...Even someone like me, who doesn't have much time left.

1100702313.english: I hope I can show you...

1100702319.english: That thing in your arms... it's the head maid, isn't it?

1100702320.english: My lord... told me to continue the pursuit... until reinforcements arrive...
1100702320.korean: 주군이… 원군이 합류할 때까지… 추적 이어가라고… 했어.

1100702321.english: The glory of hunting the target will have to be put on hold for a while.

1100702322.english: Hey! Who do you think you are, deciding whether or not to hunt?
1100702322.korean: 야! 누구 마음대로 사냥하느니 마느니 하는 거야!

1100702326.english: Why do you keep doing that when you know...?

1100702328.english: Me. Kaen... was originally my lord's... right.
1100702328.korean: 나. 카엔… 원래 주군 거… 맞아.

1100702329.english: And... Kaen, who isn't me, is also my lord's.
1100702329.korean: 그리고… 나 아닌 카엔도… 주군 거.

1100702331.english: Didn't I say you have to finish what you started?

1100702332.english: I'll take care of the problem Kaen caused!

1100702334.english: No... I'm not talking about you...

1100702335.english: You're so self-absorbed, just like someone from Densetsu!
1100702335.korean: 누가 덴세츠 출신 아니랄까봐 자의식이 왜 이리 강해!

1100702336.english: - Starting with Atalante's report, reports of seeing Kaen and Constantia began pouring in from various locations.
1100702336.korean: - 아탈란테의 보고를 시작으로 여기저기에서 카엔과 콘스탄챠를 발견했다는 보고가 올라왔다.

1100702337.english: We've detected the target moving between the front-line trenches and the horde of Iron Blooded.
1100702337.korean: 최전방 참호와 철충 무리 사이로 목표가 이동하는 것을 포착했습니다.

1100702338.english: I understand. Constantia's safety will be our top priority.
1100702338.korean: 알고 있습니다. 콘스탄챠의 안전을 최우선으로 하겠습니다.

1100702339.english: I will do so if possible, but the firepower of the Steel Line is not suitable for capture.
1100702339.korean: 가능하다면 그러도록 하겠습니다만… 스틸라인의 화력은 생포에 적합하지 않습니다.

1100702341.english: Then, Steel Line will focus on forming the encirclement.
1100702341.korean: 그러면 스틸라인은 포위망을 구성하는 데에 집중하도록 하겠습니다.

1100702342.english: And then I requested sniper support from the Sisters of Valhalla-
1100702342.korean: 그리고 시스터즈 오브 발할라에 저격수 지원을 요청하-

1100702344.english: Target, encountering a swarm of Iron Blooded!

1100702345.english: I will engage the Iron Blooded with the goal supported, Your Excellency!

1100702346.english: Annihilation of the Iron Legion swarm complete.

1100702347.english: Goal. I'm heading to the beach.

1100702349.english: ...I have confirmed that I am included in the group tracking the target.
1100702349.korean: ……목표를 추적하고 있는 무리에 포함된 것을 확인했습니다.

1100702351.english: Are you talking about a megaphone?

1100702353.english: And as I mentioned earlier, I will form a siege and request support from Valhalla.
1100702353.korean: 그리고 앞서 말씀드렸던 것처럼 포위망을 구성하고 발할라의 지원을 요청하겠습니다.

1100702354.english: - Following communication with Marie, I ordered the tracking team and other combat units not to attack Kaen.
1100702354.korean: - 마리와의 통신에 이어 나는 추적조와 다른 전투부대에 카엔을 공격하지 말라고 명령을 내려뒀다.

1100702355.english: - As I finished some of the preliminary work, Lilith asked.
1100702355.korean: - 내가 어느 정도 밑작업을 끝내자 리리스가 물었다.

1100702356.english: Are you going to leave Koyori as is?

1100702357.english: However, I'm worried about Miss Constantia's safety.
1100702357.korean: 하지만 콘스탄챠 양의 안전이 걱정이 되네요.

1100702359.english: - But unlike before, I didn't have vague, ominous worries.
1100702359.korean: - 하지만 아까 전처럼 막연한, 온갖 불길한 우려는 생기지 않았다.

1100702360.english: - Because it was the main characters, including Koyori, who rescued the princess from the blades across the country.
1100702360.korean: - 전국 블레이드에서 공주님을 구출하는 것은 코요리를 포함한 주인공들이었으니까.

1100702361.english: - Reports are coming in from all over.

1100702362.english: - Reports on the locations of Kaen and Constantia, completion of the encirclement and sniper deployment around Kaen, a report that an engagement with the Iron Blooded occurred while forming the encirclement, and a report that the tracking team, which had been heading in the wrong direction, encountered Iron Blooded.
1100702362.korean: - 카엔과 콘스탄챠의 위치에 대한 보고, 카엔에 대한 포위망의 구성과 저격수들의 배치 완료 보고, 포위망을 구성하다가 철충과 교전이 일어났다는 보고, 엉뚱한 곳으로 향했던 추적조가 철충과 조우했다는 보고 등.

1100702363.english: - I was busy giving orders for every report that came in.
1100702363.korean: - 나는 올라오는 보고에 일일이 명령을 내리느라 바빴다.

1100702364.english: - However, the whirlwind of busy moments passed in an instant, and the time for the decisive battle had arrived.
1100702364.korean: - 그러나 폭풍처럼 바쁜 순간은 순식간에 지나가고 결전의 시간이 다가왔다.

1100702365.english: - Cornered on the beach, Kaen was surrounded by the Orca crew but didn't even glance at the others.
1100702365.korean: - 해변에 몰린 카엔은 오르카의 대원들에게 둘러싸여 있었지만 다른 이들에게는 눈길 하나 주지 않았다.

1100702366.english: - Kaen carefully laid Constantia down on the floor.

1100702367.english: - And then she faced off against her longtime nemesis, Koyori, who stood before her.
1100702367.korean: - 그리고 자신 앞에 선 오랜 악연, 코요리와 대치했다.

1100702368.english: The priestess of justice and beauty! Koyori appears!

1100702369.english: I'm so tired of this bad relationship with you.

1100702370.english: What's truly tiresome is your wickedness.

1100702371.english: Why did you kidnap the head maid?

1100702372.english: Because this isn't the kind of destruction I was hoping for.
1100702372.korean: 내가 바랐던 멸망의 모습은 이런 게 아니니까.

1100702374.english: I've been hopping between various groups trying to destroy the world until now.
1100702374.korean: 나는 지금까지 세상을 멸망시키려는 여러 집단을 전전했다.

1100702375.english: Every time, your interference caused it to fail.
1100702375.korean: 그럴 때마다 네 녀석의 방해로 실패하고 말았지.

1100702376.english: However, regardless of my failure, a monster called the Iron Blood suddenly appeared, massacring humanity and destroying human civilization.
1100702376.korean: 그러나 나의 실패와는 별개로 갑자기 철충이라는 괴물이 나타나 인류를 학살하고 인간의 문명을 파괴했다.

1100702377.english: The world shouldn't have ended this way.
1100702377.korean: 세상은 이런 식으로 멸망해서는 안 됐다.

1100702378.english: The world was supposed to be utterly destroyed, with the entire world completely burned to ashes.
1100702378.korean: 세상은 온 세상이 완전히 불에 타 없어지는 식으로 철두철미하게 멸망해야 했다.

1100702379.english: Even the monsters called Metal Parasites are no exception.

1100702381.english: I will step forward and definitively destroy the world.

1100702382.english: This person is a sacrifice for the resurrection of the Otherworld King.
1100702382.korean: 이 자는 이계왕의 부활을 위한 제물이다.

1100702383.english: I won't let you destroy the world!

1100702384.english: I've tasted the bitter cup of failure because of you many times before.
1100702384.korean: 이전에도 여러 번 너 때문에 실패의 고배를 마셨었지.

1100702385.english: However, past failures do not guaranty future failures.
1100702385.korean: 그러나 이전의 실패가 다음의 실패를 보장하는 것은 아니다.

1100702386.english: This time, I will never fail!

1100702387.english: - Koyo and Kaen's battle has begun.

1100702389.english: - As befitting the motto of Densetsu, Koyo and Kaen were actors, but also warriors at the same time.
1100702389.korean: - 덴세츠의 모토 답게 코요리와 카엔은 배우였지만 동시에 전사이기도 했다.

1100702390.english: - The bullets the two people fired actually had the power to pierce someone, and the explosions they caused created new holes in the sand.
1100702390.korean: - 두 사람이 날려보내는 탄환은 실제로 누군가를 꿰뚫을 힘이 있었고, 두 사람이 일으키는 폭파에 모래사장에 새로운 구덩이가 생겨났다.

1100702391.english: You're going to fall to me anyway, so why don't you just fall now?
1100702391.korean: 어차피 나한테 쓰러질 거 미리 쓰러지면 안 돼?

1100702392.english: That arrogance will be the cause of your defeat!
1100702392.korean: 그 오만함이 네 패배의 요인이 될 거다!

1100702393.english: Isn't it time you stopped taking failures so hard?
1100702393.korean: 이제는 실패해도 그러려니 할 때가 안 됐어?

1100702394.english: If I succeed just one more time at the end, it will be a complete victory for me, so why should I give up?
1100702394.korean: 마지막에 한 번만 성공하면 완전히 나의 승리가 될 텐데 어째서 포기해야 하나!

1100702395.english: - In the fierce battle, everyone surrounding the two people focused on their fight.
1100702395.korean: - 치열한 싸움에 두 사람을 둘러싼 모든 이들이 둘의 싸움에 집중했다.

1100702396.english: - Watching their fight and conversation, I felt my suspicions turn into certainty.
1100702396.korean: - 나는 둘의 싸움과 대화를 보며 의혹이 확신으로 변하는 것을 느꼈다.

1100702397.english: - The fight between the two seemed even, but Kaen allowed Koyori's attacks to land several times, while Koyori, on the other hand, blocked and dodged all of Kaen's attacks.
1100702397.korean: - 둘의 싸움은 비등해 보였지만 카엔은 코요리의 공격을 여러 번 허용했고 반대로 코요리는 카엔의 공격을 전부 막고 피해냈다.

1100702398.english: - The tide of the battle gradually turned in Koyori's favor, and it became noticeably clear from a certain point onward.
1100702398.korean: - 전황은 조금씩 코요리에게 유리해지더니, 특정한 기점부터 확연해지기 시작했다.

1100702400.english: - Koyori shouted and threw the charm.

1100702401.english: - The flying talisman reached Kaen and a large explosion occurred.
1100702401.korean: - 날아간 부적이 카엔에게 닿더니 큰 폭발이 일어났다.

1100702402.english: - As the explosion subsided, Kaen, who had fallen to the ground, and Koyori, who was standing in front of her, were visible.
1100702402.korean: - 폭발이 사그라들자 바닥에 쓰러진 카엔과 그 앞에 선 코요리가 보였다.

1100702403.english: Hahaha! Easy win! Now I don't know how to lose.
1100702403.korean: 하하하하! 낙승! 이제는 패배하는 방법을 모르겠네.

1100702405.english: It's not just once or twice, aren't you even tired of it now?
1100702405.korean: 한두 번도 아니고 이제는 지겹지도 않아?

1100702406.english: You should understand how I feel when I keep blocking you.

1100702407.english: Then I'll make sure you never dream of the world ending again.
1100702407.korean: 그러면 다시는 세계 멸망을 꿈꾸지 못하게 해줄게.

1100702408.english: - When Koyori is about to throw the charm again at the incapacitated Kaen.
1100702408.korean: - 코요리가 무력화된 카엔을 향해 다시 부적을 던지려고 할 때.

1100702410.english: - At my shout through the megaphone, Koyori's movements stopped.
1100702410.korean: - 확성기를 통한 내 외침에 코요리의 움직임이 멈췄다.

1100702411.english: - It was clear what Koyori was trying to do.
1100702411.korean: - 코요리가 하려고 했던 행동이 무엇인지는 명확했다.

1100702413.english: - Because Densetsu aims for something more real than real, it's a real execution, not a fake one.
1100702413.korean: - 실제보다 더 실제같이를 지향하는 덴세츠이기에 가짜가 아닌 진짜 처형.

1100702414.english: But Commander. If we leave this guy like this, she'll just kidnap someone else or try to destroy the world again, won't she?
1100702414.korean: 하지만 사령관. 얘 이대로 두면 또 누군가를 납치하거나 세계를 멸망시키려고 할 텐데?

1100702417.english: - At first, I was suspicious, but after hearing Koyo and Kaen's conversation and seeing their behavior, I was convinced.
1100702417.korean: - 처음에는 의심했지만 코요리와 카엔의 대화, 둘의 태도를 보고 확신했다.

1100702418.english: - My question. Human questions. A question that's practically an order. Most Bioroids cannot answer questions falsely.
1100702418.korean: - 나의 질문. 인간의 질문. 명령이나 마찬가지인 질문. 대부분의 바이오로이드는 거짓으로 대답할 수 없는 질문.

1100702419.english: - Koyori's response to this question was.

1100702420.english: ...Tch... Guess it's hard to fool them with an impromptu script after all.

1100702422.english: - I started suspecting Koyori when Lilith raised her suspicions.
1100702422.korean: - 코요리를 의심하기 시작한 것은 리리스가 의혹을 제기했을 때부터다.

1100702423.english: Master? Excuse me, but may I say a word?
1100702423.korean: 주인님? 외람되지만 한 마디 올려도 될까요?

1100702425.english: That Miss Constantia's kidnapping wasn't a solo act.
1100702425.korean: 콘스탄챠 양의 납치가 단독 범행이 아니라는 것요.

1100702426.english: Even if the security on the Orca has become lax compared to normal, it's almost impossible for the first restored android inside the Orca to leave without any interference and without being discovered by anyone.
1100702426.korean: 지금 오르카 호의 보안이 평소보다 허술해졌다고 하더라도 오르카 호 안에서 처음으로 복원된 바이오로이드가 아무런 방해도 받지 않고, 그 누구에게도 들키지 않고 밖으로 나가는 것은 거의 불가능해요.

1100702427.english: What if there's no insider helping?

1100702428.english: And Koyori, it's strange that you only knocked out Bori and left.
1100702428.korean: 그리고 코요리, 보리를 기절만 시키고 나가는 것도 이상해요.

1100702429.english: If the kidnapper is trying to hide their identity and buy more time, killing the victim would be more appropriate than knocking them unconscious.
1100702429.korean: 만약에 납치범이 자신의 정체를 숨기고, 좀 더 시간을 벌려면 기절이 아니라 살해를 하는 쪽이 더 합당해요.

1100702430.english: The phrase "to sacrifice someone" implies that someone will be killed.
1100702430.korean: 누군가를 제물로 바친다는 말은, 누군가를 살해한다는 것을 전제할 거예요.

1100702431.english: And why did you think Miss Constantia had been kidnaped? They might have just not been there.
1100702431.korean: 그리고 왜 콘스탄챠 양이 납치를 당했다고 생각하셨나요? 단지 그 자리에 없었을 수도 있는데.

1100702433.english: - It was clear what Lilith was trying to say.

1100702435.english: I don't know the motivation either. I'd guess that... It could be to solve this case and solidify their position within the Orca, or they might be after the reward money.
1100702435.korean: 동기는 저도 모르겠어요. 짐작해보자면. 이번 사건을 해결해서 오르카 호 내의 입지를 다지기 위한 것일 수도 있고, 포상금을 원하는 것일 수도 있죠.

1100702436.english: It could be a genuine sacrifice, or it could be a sacrifice to benefit Koyori. Perhaps they're the ones being ordered around by Koyori.
1100702436.korean: 진심으로 제물로 바치기 위한 것일 수도 있고, 코요리에게 이득을 주기 위해 희생할 수도 있죠. 어쩌면 코요리에게 명령을 받는 입장일 수도 있고요.

1100702437.english: - The motive could not be clearly guessed.

1100702438.english: - However, the suspicion that Koyori was an accomplice in the kidnapping sounded closer to the truth than anything else.
1100702438.korean: - 그러나 코요리가 납치의 공범이라는 의혹은 그 어떤 것보다 진실에 가깝게 들렸다.

1100702439.english: - So, I focused on the fact that Koyori was an accomplice in the kidnapping when planning the operation.
1100702439.korean: - 그래서 나는 코요리가 납치의 공범이라는 것에 비중을 두고 작전을 구상했다.

1100702440.english: - And finally, they got a confession from Koyori.

1100702443.english: - Koyori obeyed my orders without hesitation.
1100702443.korean: - 내 명령에 코요리는 순순히 말을 들었다.

1100702444.english: - Just as Koyori is trying to return to Orca.
1100702444.korean: - 코요리가 오르카로 복귀하려고 하는 그 때.

1100702450.english: I don't know what you're talking about.

1100702451.english: I don't know who you are, but if you're trying to stop the resurrection of the Otherworld King, then you're my enemy too.
1100702451.korean: 네가 누군지는 모르겠지만 이계왕의 부활을 막는 자라면 너도 내 적이다.

1100702454.english: - ...Kaen and I have never met, have we?

1100702455.english: - Right now, Kaen only knows to do what I command through the speaker, but it doesn't know that I, the one behind the speaker, am human.
1100702455.korean: - 지금 카엔은 스피커로 내가 명령하는 것만 알지, 스피커 너머의 내가 인간이라는 것을 모른다.

1100702456.english: - Normally, I would have made her realize I was human through an interview, but Kaen kidnaped Constantia before interviewing me.
1100702456.korean: - 평범한 때라면 면담을 통해 내가 인간이라는 것을 인지시켜줬겠지만, 카엔은 나와 면담하기 전에 콘스탄챠를 납치했다.

1100702457.english: - It's a pathetic thing to say, but if it minimizes conflict, I'm willing to feel pathetic.
1100702457.korean: - 뭔가 한심하게 느껴지는 발언이지만 분쟁을 최소화할 수 있다면 한심함은 얼마든지 느끼겠다.

1100702459.english: I've never learned to surrender without a fight.
1100702459.korean: 싸우지도 않고 굴복하는 것을 배운 적은 없다.

1100702460.english: - I failed to make them realize I'm human.
1100702460.korean: - 내가 인간이라는 것을 인지시키는 것을 실패했다.

1100702461.english: - Should I land and meet them in person?

1100702462.english: - No, then the other members will stop you because of safety concerns.
1100702462.korean: - 아니, 그러면 안전 문제 때문에 다른 대원들이 말릴 거다.

1100702463.korean: - 바로 그 때 누군가가 앞으로 나섰다.

1100702465.english: - To be precise, she is Kaen, the kunoichi of the withered Muromachi flower. It's confusing, so for now, let's call you by your real name, Hatsuna.
1100702465.korean: - 정확하게 말하자면 시들어버린 무로마치의 꽃의 쿠노이치 카엔. 헷갈리니까 당분간은 본명인 하츠나라고 부르자.

1100702466.english: You... the villain actor from the National Blade... Kaen.
1100702466.korean: 너… 전국 블레이드의… 악역… 배우. 카엔.

1100702468.english: If you think so carelessly, you'll find yourself facing a world that has perished without even realizing it.
1100702468.korean: 그렇게 안일하게 생각하면 자신도 모르는 사이에 멸망한 세상과 마주하게 될 거다.

1100702469.english: You... you know. That it's all fake.
1100702469.korean: 너… 알고 있어. 다 가짜라는 거.

1100702470.english: Koyori... is lying... to protect me.

1100702473.english: Constantia... I'm not worried about her right now.
1100702473.korean: 콘스탄챠… 한테… 지금 신경… 안 써.

1100702475.english: - As Hatsuna pointed out, the quick-thinking members have already rescued Constantia.
1100702475.korean: - 하츠나의 지적대로 재빠른 대원들이 콘스탄챠를 이미 구조했다.

1100702476.english: - Only Koyori and Kaen remain within the encirclement.
1100702476.korean: - 포위망 안에 남은 것은 코요리와 카엔 뿐이다.

1100702477.english: You... you know this is all an act.
1100702477.korean: 너… 이게… 전부 연기라는 거… 알고 있어.

1100702480.english: - They didn't even show any intention of continuing the conversation.

1100702484.english: After the guys in front of me, it's your turn.
1100702484.korean: 내 앞에 있는 놈들 다음에는 네 차례다.

1100702485.english: - Kaen continued her transparent act until the very end.
1100702485.korean: - 카엔은 끝까지 뻔히 보이는 연기를 이어갔다.

1100702486.english: - No, it couldn't even be called acting anymore.
1100702486.korean: - 아니, 이제는 연기라고 할 수도 없었다.

1100702487.english: - I suppose that's what they call being deliberately provocative.
1100702487.korean: - 아마 저런 것을 위악이라고 하는 것이리라.

1100702488.english: - In this situation, there are almost no other options left.
1100702488.korean: - 이런 상황에서는 남은 방법은 거의 없다.

1100702493.english: - Hatsuna... you were like that even when I couldn't see you...

1100702494.english: - We entered the battle in a somewhat dazed atmosphere.
1100702494.korean: - 우리는 약간 얼빠진 분위기에서 전투에 돌입했다.

1100702495.english: - Although there was a commotion with Koyori and Kaen being restored and Constantia being kidnaped, fortunately, nothing irreversible happened.
1100702495.korean: - 코요리와 카엔이 복원되고 콘스탄챠가 납치당한 소란이 있었지만 다행히 돌이킬 수 없는 일이 일어나지는 않았다.

1100702496.english: - Not long after this incident subsided, a strange sight unfolded before my eyes.
1100702496.korean: - 이번 사태가 일단락되고 얼마 지나지 않아 기묘한 광경이 내 눈앞에 펼쳐졌다.

1100702500.english: - So, the three of us are gathered here together.
1100702500.korean: - 이렇게 세 명이 한 자리에 모였다.

1100702501.english: - Usually, the victim would be intimidated in a situation like this.
1100702501.korean: - 보통 이러면 피해자가 위축되기 마련일 텐데.

1100702502.english: Mr. Kaen. Are you feeling okay?

1100702504.english: That's a relief. You weren't seriously injured.

1100702506.english: Well... since I was the one doing all the beating, I'm relatively unscathed, right?
1100702506.korean: 뭐… 내가 일방적으로 두들겨 팼으니 나는 비교적 멀쩡하지?

1100702507.english: You should have taken it easy...

1100702508.english: Okay... I'll do that from now on.

1100702510.english: - It was a situation where the victim was actually worried about the perpetrator, and the perpetrator seemed intimidated by the victim.
1100702510.korean: - 피해자가 오히려 가해자를 걱정하고, 가해자가 피해자에게 위축된 분위기였다.

1100702511.english: - Actually, I didn't want to put the victim and the perpetrator in the same space, but...
1100702511.korean: - 사실 피해자와 가해자를 같은 공간에 두고 싶지는 않았지만…

1100702512.english: - At Constantia's request, I've gathered these three people here.
1100702512.korean: - 콘스탄챠의 요청이 있어서 이렇게 세 사람을 모았다.

1100702514.english: Commander. I planned this whole thing.
1100702514.korean: 사령관. 이번 일은 내가 전부 계획한 거야.

1100702515.english: No. Koyori doesn't mind. No, Koyori is also a victim. I did it all myself.
1100702515.korean: 아니. 코요리는 상관없다. 아니, 코요리도 피해자다. 모두 나 혼자 저지른 짓이다.

1100702516.english: - Constantia greeted me, and the two perpetrators were each claiming they were wrong.
1100702516.korean: - 콘스탄챠는 나를 반기고, 가해자 둘은 각자 자신이 잘못했다고 주장하고 있었다.

1100702519.english: ...Nationwide Blade, a member of the Four Heavenly Kings' Ghost Path. I am Kaen, the Crimson Demon Princess.
1100702519.korean: ……전국 블레이드, 사천왕 귀도중의 일원. 홍련의 암희 카엔이다.

1100702520.english: - Yeah, as expected, it's a self-introduction with a strong sense of self-assertion.
1100702520.korean: - 응, 역시나 자기 주장이 강한 자기 소개다.

1100702523.english: No, I'm saying again, Koyori doesn't matter. This wouldn't have happened if I hadn't been there.
1100702523.korean: 아니, 다시 말하지만 코요리는 상관없다. 내가 없었으면 일어나지 않았을 일이다.

1100702524.english: It sounds contradictory, but if Koyori planned it and Mr. Kaen carried it out, it wouldn't be that contradictory, would it?
1100702524.korean: 모순되는 것처럼 들리지만 코요리가 계획하고, 카엔 씨가 실행에 옮겼다고 하면 딱히 모순되지는 않을 거 같네요.

1100702525.english: - Constantia lightly dismissed the fact that Koyori and Kaen were protecting each other.
1100702525.korean: - 콘스탄챠는 코요리와 카엔이 서로를 감싸는 것을 가볍게 정리해버렸다.

1100702526.english: - There was no anger or resentment felt there.

1100702527.english: - As always, she did it with a kind expression.

1100702528.english: What I want to know is the motive behind this incident.
1100702528.korean: 제가 알고 싶은 것은 이번 일의 동기예요.

1100702531.english: - The two people fell silent at Constantia's latest question.
1100702531.korean: - 콘스탄챠의 이번 질문에 두 사람은 침묵했다.

1100702532.english: As the person involved in this matter, I'd like to know.

1100702533.english: ...Could you give me a moment to gather my thoughts?

1100702535.english: No, you don't need to organize it separately.

1100702537.english: The resurrection of the Otherworld King?

1100702541.english: Our last memory was... a desperate situation where there was absolutely no hope in sight.
1100702541.korean: 우리들의 마지막 기억은… 도저히 희망이 보이지 않는 절망적인 상황이었으니까.

1100702542.english: Rather than struggling meaninglessly to survive...

1100702543.english: As an actor, it would be much happier to reenact our original work and die according to the original ending.
1100702543.korean: 배우답게 우리의 원래 작품을 재연하고, 원래의 결말대로 죽는 쪽이 훨씬 행복하겠지.

1100702544.english: ...the old Kaen asked me to do that at the end.

1100702545.english: So, as soon as Kaen was restored, I asked. How do you want to handle it?
1100702545.korean: 그래서 카엔이 복원되자마자 물었어. 어떻게 하고 싶냐고.

1100702548.english: - Neither Constantia nor I could say anything in response to that.
1100702548.korean: - 콘스탄챠도, 나도 여기에 대해 뭐라고 대꾸하지 못했다.

1100702549.english: - I was speechless at the situation, which was so desperate that she would rather die as an actor.
1100702549.korean: - 차라리 배우로서 죽는 것을 택할 정도로 절망적이었던 상황에 말문이 막혔다.

1100702550.english: - Also, it's pointless to criticize other people's wishes without thinking.
1100702550.korean: - 또한 함부로 남의 소원에 대해서 왈가불가하는 것도 무의미하니까.

1100702551.english: - Of course, we weren't completely unaffected by this situation either-
1100702551.korean: - 물론 이번 사태로 피해를 입지 않은 것은 아니니-

1100702552.english: ...Are you going to kill us now?

1100702553.english: ...I was prepared. And since we're androids, we can't even rebel...
1100702553.korean: ……각오는 했어. 그리고 바이오로이드인 이상 우리는 반항도 못하니…

1100702556.english: Why did you think I was going to kill you?

1100702557.english: Because I've committed a mortal sin.

1100702558.english: Because you recklessly deceived humans and caused them harm.
1100702558.korean: 함부로 인간을 속이고, 함부로 피해를 입혔으니까.

1100702559.english: But... wouldn't it be natural to be punished for causing this much trouble?
1100702559.korean: 하지만… 이 정도로 문제를 일으키면 처분 당하는 게 당연하지 않나?

1100702560.english: - It might have been obvious to ancient humans, but it's not for modern humans.
1100702560.korean: - 옛 인류에게는 당연했을 지도 모르겠지만 지금의 인류는 그렇지 않다.

1100702561.english: - Because I, the only human, decided it.

1100702562.english: - Of course, I'm not sure what would have happened if they had actually sacrificed Constantia...
1100702562.korean: - 물론 콘스탄챠를 정말로 제물로 바쳤다면 어떻게 될 지 나도 확신하지 못하지만…

1100702563.english: - Thinking about how Kaen carefully put down Constantia right before fighting Koyori, it was clear she truly didn't intend to harm her.
1100702563.korean: - 카엔이 코요리와 싸우기 직전에 콘스탄챠를 조심스럽게 내려놓았던 모습을 떠올리면 정말로 해칠 마음은 없었던 것이 분명했다.

1100702565.english: - I expected her to immediately say no, but unlike my prediction, Constantia didn't answer right away.
1100702565.korean: - 즉각적으로 아니라는 말이 나올 거라고 예상했지만 콘스탄챠는 내 예상과는 달리 즉답하지 않았다.

1100702566.english: Even so, since they did something wrong, shouldn't they be punished?
1100702566.korean: 그래도 잘못을 했으니 처벌은 받아야 하지 않겠어요?

1100702567.english: - Koyori and Kaen looked dumbfounded at my silly voice.
1100702567.korean: - 나의 얼빠진 소리에 코요리와 카엔은 어이없다는 표정을 지었다.

1100702569.english: Rewarding the good and punishing the bad is fundamental to management.

1100702570.english: Would it be alright if I decided the punishment?
1100702570.korean: 혹시 처벌 내용은 제가 정해도 될까요?

1100702571.english: - And I said something foolish again.
1100702571.korean: - 나는 한 번 더 얼빠진 소리를 했고.

1100702572.english: Then, from now on, the two of you...

1100702575.english: Extermination of Iron Worms within the city and in the surrounding area is complete.

1100702576.english: Resource acquisition and base establishment are underway.

1100702577.english: The two new people... they're quite useful.
1100702577.korean: 새로 들어온 두 사람… 꽤나 쓸만하네.

1100702578.english: It's not just because it's their home ground, their direct combat power is also something to be reckoned with.
1100702578.korean: 자기들 홈그라운드라는 것도 있지만 직접적인 전투력도 무시 못 하겠어.

1100702579.english: Well, how else would they have fought against the massive army surrounding them?
1100702579.korean: 하긴 그렇지 않으면 어떻게 자신들을 둘러싼 대군과 싸우려고 했겠어?

1100702580.english: Material power is important, but leadership in battle is also crucial, right?

1100702581.english: It's like you don't lose if you don't think you've lost.
1100702581.korean: 패배했다고 생각하지 않으면 패배하지 않는 것처럼.

1100702582.english: - After receiving reports on this operation from the two commanders.
1100702582.korean: - 두 지휘관에게 이번 작전에 대한 보고를 받은 후.

1100702583.english: Easy win, easy win! They weren't anything special, were they?
1100702583.korean: 낙승, 낙승! 별 거 아닌 녀석들이었네.

1100702584.english: In the past, I only lost... I see now that I could have won like this.
1100702584.korean: 과거에는 패배하기만 했는데… 이렇게 이길 수 있었군.

1100702585.english: Hey! We only won until we lost!
1100702585.korean: 야! 우리는 지기 전까지는 승리만 했거든!

1100702586.english: You're the protagonist, after all... I've always lost to you.
1100702586.korean: 너는 주인공이니까… 나는 맨날 너에게 지지 않았나.

1100702587.english: - The two people who played a major role in this operation have returned.
1100702587.korean: - 이번 작전에 대활약을 펼친 두 사람이 돌아왔다.

1100702590.english: Is this the end of our punishment?

1100702591.english: - The punishment Constantia handed down to the two of them was to 'join forces with Orca's other companions and restore the city.' It was.
1100702591.korean: - 콘스탄챠가 두 사람에게 내린 처벌은 ‘오르카의 다른 동료들과 힘을 합쳐 도시를 수복하는 것.’이었다.

1100702592.english: So, what happens to us now?
1100702592.korean: 그러면 이제 우리는 어떻게 되는 거야?

1100702593.english: Are you sure you'll be okay?

1100702594.english: As you know, I'm not exactly a good person, am I?

1100702595.english: And if it's for my own benefit, I don't hesitate to deceive others.
1100702595.korean: 내 이득을 위해서라면 남을 속이는 것도 거리낌이 없고 말이야.

1100702596.english: - Well, even before this incident, it was like that in your work too.
1100702596.korean: - 하긴 이번 사태가 아니더라도, 작품에서도 그랬었지.

1100702597.english: But I've also become someone who can deceive others without feeling anything.
