1100702597.korean: 하지만 나도 남을 속여도 아무렇지 않게 만들어져서.

1100702598.english: Even if you don't tell a direct lie, there are countless ways to deceive.
1100702598.korean: 직접적인 거짓말은 하지 않아도 속이는 방법은 얼마든지 있지.

1100702599.english: Like how you did this time, when I try to ask something, you just say what you want to say before you even hear the whole question.
1100702599.korean: 이번에 그랬던 것처럼 뭔가 캐물으려고 하면 질문을 다 듣기 전에 미리 내가 하고 싶은 말만 하는 식으로 말이야.

1100702600.english: - Come to think of it, when you said Constantia was kidnaped, you cut me off and answered before I could even finish my question.
1100702600.korean: - 그러고 보니 콘스탄챠가 납치됐다고 말했을 때, 내가 마저 질문하기도 전에 내 말을 끊고 대답했었지.

1100702602.english: That's just a story within the work, isn't it... well. But it's still true that we tried to deceive everyone together.
1100702602.korean: 그건 어디까지나 작품 속 이야기 아닌가… 뭐. 너랑 합심해서 모두를 속이려 했다는 건 변함이 없지만.

1100702603.english: Are you going to deceive others again?

1100702604.english: It's hard to say for sure what will happen in the future, right?

1100702606.english: ...Looking at the commander, he reminds me of the lord who appeared in our game.
1100702606.korean: ……사령관을 보면 우리 게임에 나왔던 영주가 생각나네.

1100702607.english: - That means you're easily fooled by others!

1100702609.english: On the contrary, I have a question for both of you, if that's alright?
1100702609.korean: 반대로 두 분께 여쭤볼 게 있는데 괜찮으신가요?

1100702612.english: - At Koyori's words, Constantia blushed slightly before continuing.
1100702612.korean: - 코요리의 말에 콘스탄챠는 잠시 얼굴을 붉혔다가 말을 이었다.

1100702613.english: Do you two find the current situation as hopeless as you thought it would be?
1100702613.korean: 두 분이 보시기에 두 분이 생각했던 것처럼 지금 상황이 절망적으로 보이시나요?

1100702614.english: So much so that upon being restored, they chose to end their newfound opportunity with death.
1100702614.korean: 복원 되면서 기껏 새로 얻은 기회를 죽음으로 종결짓는 것을 택할 정도로요.

1100702616.english: It seems that Kaen's last uploaded memory, a desperate one, prevented her from realizing reality.
1100702616.korean: 마지막으로 기억을 업로드했던 카엔의 절망적인 기억이 현실을 깨닫지 못하게 했던 것 같다.

1100702617.english: If Koyori had properly understood the situation and conveyed it to me, this wouldn't have happened.
1100702617.korean: 코요리가 전후사정을 제대로 파악하고 나에게 전달해줬으면 이런 일도 없었겠지.

1100702618.english: Hey! It was your last wish before!

1100702619.english: ...I want to die as a villain actor.

1100702620.english: The previous me is the previous me. The me I am now is the me I am now.
1100702620.korean: 이전의 나는 이전의 나. 지금의 나는 지금의 나.

1100702621.english: This guy, now that she's feeling better, she's getting cocky.

1100702622.english: Not as brazen as you always are.

1100702623.english: - Listening to their conversation, I could tell how comfortable they both felt with Orca right now.
1100702623.korean: - 두 사람의 대화를 듣고 있으니 두 사람이 지금 오르카를 얼마나 편안하게 여기는지 알 수 있었다.

1100702624.english: - Koyori and Kaen looked at me.

1100702626.english: In the past, it ended with a bad ending, but...

1100702627.english: This time it will be different.

1100702628.english: The priestess of justice and beauty! Because Koyori came back!
1100702628.korean: 정의와 미모의 무녀! 코요리가 다시 왔으니까!​

1100702629.english: And... because everyone from Orca is here!

1100702630.english: This time, I'll be able to have a happy ending!
1100702630.korean: 이번에는 해피 엔딩을 맞이할 수 있을 거야!

1100702631.english: - From their attitude, I could guess how many androids in the current world are despairing.
1100702631.korean: - 두 사람의 태도로 나는 지금의 세계에 절망하고 있는 바이오로이드들이 얼마나 많을지 짐작이 갔다.

1100702632.english: - Even Koyo, who was made a hero, and Kaen, who can perform as well as a hero, are like this.
1100702632.korean: - 영웅으로 만들어진 코요리와 영웅만큼이나 활약할 수 있는 카엔도 이러니 말이다.

1100702633.english: - Of course, our current situation wasn't entirely positive either.
1100702633.korean: - 물론 우리의 지금 상황도 마냥 긍정적이지는 않았다.

1100702634.english: - But I realized that our meager strength could also be the power to instill despair in others.
1100702634.korean: - 하지만 우리의 미약한 힘이 다른 이들에게 절망을 떨칠 힘이 될 수도 있다는 것을 깨달았다.

1100702635.english: - I am. No, everyone in Orca. It will give hope to all those in despair and the strength to move forward into the future.
1100702635.korean: - 나는. 아니, 오르카의 모두는. 절망에 빠진 모든 이들에게 희망을 주며 미래로 나아갈 힘을 줄 것이다.

1100702636.english: - I will keep this fact in mind and fight together with everyone.
1100702636.korean: - 나는 이 사실을 상기하며 모두와 힘을 합쳐 싸워나갈 것이다.

1100702637.english: < Curtain Call After the Apocalypse > EN...

1100702639.english: If you think about it, the commander is the one who solved this case, right?
1100702639.korean: 따지자면 이번 사건을 해결한 건 사령관이지?

1100702640.english: The commander is the one who commands everyone, right?

1100702641.english: - At my words, Koyori cleared her throat and spoke in a deep, masculine voice.
1100702641.korean: - 내 말에 코요리는 목을 가다듬고는 굵은 남자 목소리를 냈다.

1100702642.english: Excellent. You managed to save the princess.

1100702643.english: I'll give you anything you want as a reward! Alright, tell me what you want.
1100702643.korean: 상으로 원하는 것은 뭐든지 주마! 자, 뭘 원하는지 말해보거라.

1100702644.english: - I didn't suddenly ask what she was talking about.
1100702644.korean: - 나는 뜬금없이 무슨 소리냐고 묻지 않았다.

1100702645.english: - This is the line the lord said in National Blade when Koyori appeared and successfully rescued the princess.
1100702645.korean: - 코요리가 등장했던, 전국 블레이드에서 코요리가 무사히 공주를 구출했을 때, 영주가 했던 대사다.

1100702648.english: I'll be glad to do that.

1100702650.english: - Constantia was flustered and looked back and forth between me and Koyori.
1100702650.korean: - 콘스탄챠는 당황해서 나와 코요리를 번갈아 보았다.

1100702651.english: - Koyori silently mouthed to Constantia, "With this, I've paid off my debt, haven't I?" I saw her saying that.
1100702651.korean: -코요리가 콘스탄챠에게 소리없이 입술로만 ‘이걸로 나름 빚은 갚았다?’라고 말하는 것이 보였다.

1100702652.english: Then let the two of you have a happy time.
1100702652.korean: 그러면 두 사람 다 행복한 시간을 보내도록.

1100702653.english: - Koyori and Kaen left, leaving the two of us behind.
1100702653.korean: - 코요리와 카엔은 우리 두 사람을 남기고 떠났다.

1100702655.english: - Constantia doesn't seem to know what happened.
1100702655.korean: - 콘스탄챠는 무슨 일이 일어났는지 모르는 눈치다.

1100702656.english: - Then there's nothing we can do.

1100702657.english: - I said that and led Constantia to my room.
1100702657.korean: - 나는 그렇게 말하고 콘스탄챠를 내 방으로 이끌었다.

1100702658.english: - It was a troublesome case, but this is how we reached a happy ending.
1100702658.korean: - 골치 아픈 사건이었지만 이렇게 우리는 해피 엔딩을 맞이했다.

1100702659.english: < Curtain Call After the Apocalypse > END.

1100702660.english: Once you find the target, don't attack, just track it until reinforcements arrive.
1100702660.korean: 목표를 찾으면 공격하지 말고 증원이 올 때까지 추적만 해.

1100702661.english: That's just a story in a game, after all!

1100702662.english: Have you checked the security cameras?

1100702663.english: What other security devices are there?

1100702668.english: And if possible, capture Kaen alive too.
1100702668.korean: 그리고 될 수 있는 한 카엔도 생포해.

1100702669.english: I have something to ask Kaen.

1100702670.english: Have you seen Koyori by any chance?

1100702671.english: Please keep reporting on Koyori too.
1100702671.korean: 코요리에 대한 것도 계속 보고해 줘.

1100702673.english: Yeah. Connect directly from my end.

1100702674.english: Yeah. I think that's the right thing to do to control the situation.
1100702674.korean: 응. 상황을 통제하려면 그게 맞을 거 같아.

1100702676.english: It's probably best to leave Kaen's opponent to Koyori.
1100702676.korean: 카엔의 상대는 코요리에게 맡기는 게 정답일 거야.

1100702681.english: It was planned from the beginning, wasn't it?

1100702684.english: You're saying it wasn't a solo act?

1100702686.english: You might be averse to killing, right?

1100702691.english: Quit the theater and come back.

1100702697.english: I'll say it one more time. Surrender.
